"You better believe I dare!"

If Alexis could pump her arms and shout in victory, she totally would! Both for Syrus's trap and his trash talk.

"Well let's see how daring you are after this!" Titian said smugly as he showed a card fro his hand "I play Desk Rook Archfiend's special effect! It allows me to resurrect my Terror King by sending this card to the graveyard!"

He did just that, and sure enough the very unwelcome sight of the Terror King appeared on the field.

"And I just got rid of him too.." Syrus sighed.

"You will find that the terror never ends with him. And thanks to Pandemonium I can draw another Archfiend from my deck to my hand! Not a strong one mind you, but my Terror King is more then enough for the job! Now let's try this again, Locus Storm Barrage!"

All Syrus could do was watch as his poor submarine was reduced to scrap, but since it was in Defence Mode his Life Points suffered no damage. Now that it was his turn he drew a card, and it was a card that could turn this whole duel around if he was lucky. This next move would be a huge gamble, but if wanted to have any hope of winning he had no other choice.

"I summon Steamroid in Attack Mode! And this little engine that could has the special effect that if he is attacking a monster stronger then him, the he gains 500 ATK! Go Steamroid! Turn his Terror King to paste!"

Steamroid ATK: 1800-2300

"Don't forget about my Terror King's effect boy! Whether or not your attack is successful is in the hands of fate!"

Once again the wheel of balls that would decide the outcome of this attack, and by extension the duel, was brought forth. The tension was so thick you could cut it with a knife as the flame went from one ball to the next. And just when it seemed that all was lost when ball paused longer on a 5, the flame ultimately came to a stop on 6.

"YES!!"

"NO, IT CAN'T BE!!"

Steamroid was free to flatten Terror King like a pancake!

Titian's LP:3200-2900

"And now I activate my other trap card Call of the Haunted! With this I can select a monster from my graveyard to Attack Mode, and then send it back to the graveyard when the attack is finished! And I bring back from the scrap heap, ready for some much needed revenge, Gyroid!"

Like a vengeful spirit come to claim retribution Gyroid gleefully attacked, happy that as he was sent back to the grave, justice was served.

Titian's LP:2900-1900

"How do you like me now!" Syrus fist pumped in victory as he even out the playing field.

Alexis was ecstatic! Syrus was kicking ass! [He can do this! He can win!]

Titian on the other hand clenched a tight fist in anger as more parts of his body started to fade [This boy is putting up a better fight then I could have imagined. I will look foreword to crushing that wretched fighting spirit of his. And I will especially look foreword to violating that girl once I'm done.] he thought with sickening delight as he made his draw.
1213222111.title: David and Goliath, YuGiOh Version, Part 2!

choices: Syrus vs Titian! Part 4!
12132221111.content:
Syrus LP:2100
Titian LP:1900

"Do not mistake this miracle for a victory boy! Because a miracle can only happen once! For you see, I have another Desk Rook Archfiend to discard from my hand so that my Terror King can rise again!"

Sure enough, the wretched sight of Terror King appeared again to Syrus's life hell.

"For crying out loud! What does it take to get rid of this guy?!" Syrus shouted exasperatedly.

"As I said before, the terror never ends with him. Now Terror King, crush that worthless locomotive along with any hopes the boy had of saving the girl!"

This next attack was a double whammy for Syrus, for while his Steamroid's effect increases it's ATK by 500 when it attacks a stronger monster, if a stronger monster attacks it, it loses 500 ATK.

Syrus LP:2100-1400

Titian let out a sinister chuckle as he held out the same pyramid as before to shine it's strange light. "Don't you see now boy? You never had a chance against me! And once all your Life Points are gone and your soul is sent to the Shadow Realm, I will be free to violate the girl at my leisure before claiming Jaden's soul as well!"

Alexis felt a wave of dread as she heard all this play out [Don't give up Syrus! You have to pull through!] she pleaded, hoping that her prayers would somehow reach him.

[What's with that pyramid he has? And why does it look so familiar?] Syrus pondered, but pondering became difficult as his mind started to feel fuzzy and his vision began to blur [What's happening to me?]

"Gaze deep into my Millennium Pendent boy, it will be the last thing you'll ever see!"

[That's a Millennium Item?..Wait..Did he call it a pendent?..But it looks like..!] And just like that it all clicked together in Syrus's head, and with this realization all his fear and confusion disappeared.

"Can you feel the grip of the shadows as they slowly and painfully choke what's left of your soul? Well if you think that's bad, trust me boy, it only gets worse from-"

"Hehehehe..HAHAHAHAHAHA!!!"

Titian's monologue was cut short when Syrus suddenly bursts into hysterical laughter.

[Why is he laughing?! Has all the fear driven him mad?!] the masked man thought nervously. For while he may have terrorized many duelists in his career, he never driven any of them to insanity.

Alexis was also very unsettle from the laughter. She desperately hoped her friend hadn't just lost his mind.

"You know what's funny?" Syrus asked as he wiped a tear of mirth from his eye "I'm scared of a lot of things. I'm scared of heights, the dark, thunderstorms, hell I'm so scared of drowning I never learned how to swim! But, even with the mile long list of fears I have, I can say with complete honesty..I'M. NOT. SCARED. OF. YOU."

Alexis sigh deeply with relief in hearing that Syrus was still in this fight, and she would never admit it to anyone, but she might've swooned a little at his courageous speech.

Titian on the other hand felt an unexpected twinge of fear in his heart as he could see that his tiny foe wasn't bluffing. He stood tall(figuratively speaking), he didn't tremble in the slightest, and his eyes still blazed with the same fire as before. In fact it seemed even brighter then before. He shook it off, he would not allow this runt to make a fool of him.

"Your bravery means less then nothing boy, there isn't a single card in your worthless deck that can match the overwhelming power of my Archfiends! So make your move, but know that once you do-"

"Oh shut up already!" Syrus interrupted as he made his draw. It wasn't much, but this next move will keep him in this fight for at least one more turn. First, I switch gyroid to defense mode!"

Gyroid DEF:1000

Then I’ll finish by playing this card face-down The time isn’t right for it just yet, but by next turn it will be. Alright asshole, do your worst!"

As Alexis continued listen to all this playing out, her imagination was starting to picture Syrus in more manly light due to how fearless he sounded compared to his normally more meek demeanor, and despite his relatively weak play.[When did Syrus become so badass?] she thought with a blush.

"You want my worst boy?" Titian asked as he made his draw, “I activate my own Pot of Greed.” As Titan pulled the top two cards off of his deck his smirk threatened to split his face in two when he saw what he now had in his hand "It seems like you shall have it! I sacrifice my Terror King to call forth The Skull Archfiend Of Lightning!"

Skull Archfiend Of Lightning ATK:2500

I then play Double summon to allow me to summon my Shadowknight archfiend.

"I seem to recall you saying you were afraid of thunderstorms, well prepare for the worst and last one of your wretched life as my Skull Archfiend and Shadowknight lay waste to your pathetic monster.

The evil beast did their master's bidding, causing a gigantic lightning bolt and a blast of darkness to crash down on Gyroid, destroying it and leaving Syrus defenseless once again except for his facedown.

“Your card can do nothing to hurt me,” Titan said with a chuckle as his monster’s attacks finished, “I end my turn so that you can have your last.”


Syrus grimaced, and if he was honest with himself he even started shaking again, but even with all this stacked against him, he still refused to back down, refused to give up. He placed his hand to his deck to make his last move. One way or another, with this last draw, this duel finally ends!
12132221111.title: David and Goliath, YuGiOh Version, Part 3!

choices: A wholesome reward, like a heartfelt kiss!
A sexy reward, she starts giving him a striptease!
121322211111.content:
Syrus LP:1400
Titian LP:1900

Syrus looked at his final draw, and he knew that this duel was over. "Alright.." he said with a triumphant smirk.

Titian felt that twinge of fear again when he saw that smirk on his face "What are you smiling at boy? Surely you don't believe you still have a chance of victory?" he said trying his best to still sound intimidating.

"This 'boy' has a name!" Syrus had enough of this fraud, and was ready to finally put him in his place. "It's Syrus Truesdale! And this 'boy' is about to kick your ass, motherfucker! I play Mystical Space Typhoon! With this I can destroy any 1 magic or trap card in play, and I choose to destroy Pandemonium!"

And with that said, a raging wind of pure magic blew across the field, destroying Pandemonium and returning the room back to it's original, yet still pretty creepy state.

Titian started to sweat nervously when he saw the backbone of his battle strategy shattered "No..this can't be happening."

"Oh it's happening alright! Because now I activate my facedown card, Pot of Avarice. It lets me return five monsters from my graveyard to my deck, shuffle up, and draw two cards.”

As Syrus drew his cards, his smile widened even further, much to Titan’s annoyance.

“Now I summon my Cycroid in attack mode,” Syrus called.

A cartoonish bicycle with eyes appeared on Syrus’s field and glared at the masked man.

Cycroid Atk: 800

“Next I equip it with the spell Training Wheels.”

“And what are those kids toys going to do?” Titan asked while he regained some of his cocky demeanor.

They are gonna let me attack you directly for 800 points of damage is what they are gonna do,” Syrus yelled confidently.

“What?!” Titan choked out as he broke out in a cold sweat.

Meanwhile inside the sarcophagus, Alexis’s heart leapt for joy as the math ran through her head.

“It may not take you out right away, but with Pandemonium off the field, you have to pay up a grand total of 1400 lifepoints on your turn thanks to your monsters” Syrus stated triumphantly.

"No..NO!! I CAN'T LOSE TO A BOY LIKE YOU!!!" Titan shouted as he realized what was about to happen.

"FINISH IT!!!"

Titian LP:1900-800 =1100

Syrus's Vehicroid's did as commanded and utterly shattered the nightmarish persona that Titian had worked so hard to maintain. Because now the second he made his draw, he would enter his stand-by phase and have no choice but to pay with the rest of his Life Points due to his monsters’s costs. This boy had just defeated him in the most humiliating way possible, using his own play style against him.

The masked man trembled in barely contained anger, and even fear as his hated foe stood with arms crossed confidently.

"What's the matter big guy?..Scared?" Syrus asked in a patronizing tone.

Meanwhile in the coffin a still bound Alexis was both stunned from Syrus's victory and unbelievably turned on due to his remarkable confidence he gained over the course of his ordeal. [When I get out of this, I am going to rock his 4 foot world!]

"Grrr..You dare to make a mockery of me?!" Titian questioned with fury as he raised his pyramid again in the vain hope that he could still save some face for this humiliation. "You dare mock my Shadow Game?!"

"Here's what I think of your 'Shadow Game'!" Syrus shouted as he pick up a rock at his feet and threw it. The rock nailed Titian's hand causing him to drop the fake Millennium Item to the floor shattering it to pieces. "Just as I thought! This whole Shadow Game was fake! Neither mine or Alexis's soul's were in any danger!"

"Grrrrr..Hehehehe..Maybe the game was fake, but the girl's life is still very much in my hands boy! Only I can unlock the sarcophagus she is entombed in! And there she will remain for the rest of eternity as you will never see me again boy!" And with that the desperate criminal threw a smoke bomb to the floor to cover his escape.

The man’s cowardice upon being revealed as a fraud drove Syrus into an uncharacteristic rage.

"GET BACK HERE YOU DAMN COWARD!!! I'LL RIP YOUR DICK OFF AND SHOVE IT DOWN YOUR THROAT!!!" he bellowed in rage as he charged at his nemesis.

But as he did so the snake statues that littered the chamber started to glow an ominous light, and then a giant glowing egyptian eye covered the floor confusing everyone in the room.

"What the hell are you trying to pull now?!"

"No! I'm not doing any of this!"

Little did any of them realize at the time, but they were in fact playing in a Shadow Game. And now the forces of the Shadow Realm had come to claim their prize. A dark vortex engulfed the room and when it faded hundreds of gray slime creatures the size of a baseball started to surround and consume the fake Shadow Duelist.

"WHAT'S HAPPENING?!?! GET AWAY FROM ME!!!" Titian cried out in terror as he struggled to fight off the monsters. But there were far too many "NO STOP!!! HELP ME!!! SYRUS!!! HELP MEEMMMPH!!!!" A blob flew into his mouth silencing his desperate pleas.

Syrus could only watch in horror as he knew that the very second his enemy finally used his name that he was in serious peril. Titan may have been a fake Shadow Duelist, but the Shadow Realm was very real.

"MMMPPPHHH!! MMMPHH!!"

His attention was then turned to the coffin that had Alexis trapped, only to find that it was open! The Shadow monsters must've hit the button that opened it. But Alexis was far from safe as some blobs were crawling on her as well, and as she was still bound and gagged she couldn't fight them off, only sit there as the liquid that composed their bodies soaked into her clothes and skin while they covered her.

So Syrus once again had to dive into the abyss to save her, this time the real one.

"HANG ON ALEXIS!!! I'M COMING!!!"

Syrus ran, jumped, dodged and weaved his way through the swam of blobs until he made it to where she laid helpless "Get off her!!" he shouted as he swatted the evil balls off of his friend. Then with strength fueled by pure adrenaline he picked up Alexis and carried her over his shoulder fireman style and ran as fast as his short legs could carry them.

As they made their escape Alexis could see that all that remained of Titan was a hand reaching out for someone, anyone, to grab hold and save him from his fate. She couldn't help but feel a twinge of pity as she closed her eyes, not wanting to see the shadows claim another victim.

Once Syrus was sure they were out of danger he gently placed Alexis up right against a wall in room full murals that show hieroglyphics of The Millennium Items, and collapsed on the floor in exhaustion.

As the short hero spent a few minutes to catch his breath Alexis, couldn't help but gaze at him fondly. Never in her life had she met someone so amazing, so brave.

Then she turned her gaze upon murals on the walls, due what she and Syrus had just witnessed as well the well know his behind the items on the displays, it now all made sense as to what happened to all the people who disappeared. They unknowingly uncovered ancient ruins that had ties to the Shadow Realm, and since they were at a school where duels happening everyday, they were unknowingly participating in Shadow Games.

Which meant that her brother was trapped in the Shadow Realm..never to be seen again. But just before despair could fully take hold of her the mourning sun peaked into the windows and reflected on a picture hanging on the wall that shined on her face. She instinctively looked back at it and her heart stopped when she saw the face on it..dare she hoped?

"Mmmpphh! Mmmph! mmph!" she tried to say to Syrus through the duck tape still on her mouth.

He blinked in confusion "What?"

She shot him a dirty look.

"Oh right! Let me get that for you."

*RIP!*

"The picture over there! Bring it to me!" she demanded, ignoring the pain on her face from the tape.

"Okay!" he said meekly as he scrambled to obey. But not before remembering something important, he took off his Red outer shirt to cover her popped open top then went to get the picture.

She couldn't help but be touched be his thoughtful gesture. Most guys would milk this opportunity to get a free show, but he didn't hesitate to do the right thing. [Such a gentleman.] she thought with a hot blush. Not a second later Syrus was back with the picture in hand, and sure enough it was a picture of Atticus! "That's my brother!" she said with tears of joy.

"Really?!"

"No doubt! I'd recognize that face anywhere!" She tried to grab hold of it, only to remember that she was still tied up.

"Hang on I'll look for something sharp!"

He didn't have to look far as there was plenty of broken glass laying around. Once Alexis was free she held the picture of brother close to her heart. Then she turned her attention back to Syrus who was giving her a smile.

He had did more for her in one night then anyone else had ever done for her in her whole life. He overcame his fears and impossible odds, saved her from the clutches of a demented man and horrors from another world, and above all else gave her hope that her long lost brother was still alive.

She knew in that moment that she fell unconditionally, and hopelessly in love with him.

She all so knew in that moment, she needed to do something, anything to repay him.
121322211111.title: David and Goliath, YuGiOh Version, Finale!

choices: A few nights later, Alexis is at the peir having some alone time.
Later that night, Alexis is in her room thinking about her new love.
Reader's choice.
1213222111111.content:
"Syrus..I can't begin to thank you enough for all you've done for me tonight." Alexis said sincerely.

"Aw, you don't need to do that Alexis." Syrus said bashfully as he rubbed the back of his head. "Besides, you didn't expel me and Jaden when we trespassed on the girls dorm, so I'd say we're even."

"No we're not! We're not remotely close to being even!" she insisted "You saved my life Syrus! In more ways then I think you realize! What you did tonight was the most incredible thing anyone has ever done for me! You deserve a freaking metal at the very least, but since I don't have any on me, I'm just going to have to give you the next best thing I can think of!"

What she gave him was something that just about every boy on campus (and a few girls) would have sold their souls to the devil for, because that is what all of them believed is what it would take to have what was given willing to the last boy anyone, including herself before tonight, would've expected.

Her first kiss.

Syrus was frozen stiff as he felt her luscious lips against his. He believed that never in a million years would he actually have a chance of Alexis kissing him like this, so tenderly and lovingly. Especially when he had his hopes crushed by that stupid fake love letter. He thought the closest thing he would ever get was what he would see in his wildest fantasies.

But this was really happening! The girl of his dreams was really kissing him!

All to soon for the both of them the kiss ended when the need for air became to great to ignore. As she caught her breath she had a gorgeous smile on her face as she stared deep into his wide grey eyes with all the love in her heart, which was endless.

"So..how long has this been a thing?" asked an unexpected and familiar voice.

Alexis turned to meet the voice and sure enough there stood Jaden and Chumley, looking at the couple with a mixture of awe and confusion. "Jaden? Chumley? What are you guys doing here?" she asked.

"Well, we waited for Syrus to come back to the dorm, but then we started to get worried he got lost or something. So we went out to look for him, only to get lost ourselves and just wandered our way here!" Jaden explained with a bit of a chuckle in his voice as he found the irony funny.

Alexis just gave him a flat look [Yep. I am officially over him.]

"But that still doesn't answer my question from earlier. How long have you two been a thing? And do you guys want us to leave so you can finish?" he asked with a teasing grin.

She had a blush on her face once she remembered her state of dress, it didn't paint a very clear picture as to what really happened to them "Hold on! This isn't what it looks like! Syrus and I can explain everything!"

"Sure you can.."

"YES, WE CAN."

"Well if you really want Syrus to help explain, then you might want to give him a kiss of life this time because I think you just killed him." Chumley said as he pointed to a still frozen Syrus.

The little underdog had the biggest dumb grin on his face as he was still processing the fact that Alexis Freaking Rhodes Just Kissed Him!!

"Um, Syrus?" Alexis asked worried for her hero as she poked him on the forehead to try a snap him out of his trance. Only to accidentally cause him to tip over like a chopped down tree. "Syrus!!"

As Alexis and his friends spent the next few minutes saving him from dying of sheer happiness all Syrus could think was [Open the pearly gates for me Peter..I'm coming home.]

Luckily they were able to stop him from slipping the mortal coil and together he and Alexis explained in great detail what really happened. Needless to say, Jaden and Chumley were beyond impressed with there little buddy.

"Syrus, you sly dog! You've been holding out on us!" Jaden exclaimed as he gave him a brotherly slug to his shoulder.

"Guys come on..It's not that big of a deal." Syrus said humbly with a blush.

"'Not a big deal' he says!" Chumley interjected "Dude, what you did wasn't just licious, it was freaking badass!"

Syrus blinked in surprise as that was the last word he thought anyone would use to describe him. "A badass? Me?!"

"You better believe it! Charging head first to face danger, defeating the bad guy, fighting off a swarm of monsters while rescuing the damsel in distress!" Jaden listed each feat with increasing pride in his friend "Dude! You're not just a badass! Your bonafide Knight In Shining Armor!"

"Okay, now you guys are just embarrassing me!"

Alexis smiled warmly as she watched her new love getting his well earned praise. Then from the corner of her eye she saw a decorative sword hanging from a nearby wall, and Jaden's Knight comment gave her an idea. "Well, he's not a Knight yet." she said as she walked over to grab the sword.

The Slifer Trio all looked at her curiously "What do you mean?" Jaden asked.

"Knights receive their knighthood by swearing their loyalty to a monarch." she explained as she claimed the sword from the wall "And since I'm The Queen of Obelisk Blue, I believe it's only fitting that I have a Knight of my own."

Syrus couldn't believe what he was hearing, she couldn't be serious about this, could she?! "Alexis you don't have to-"

"Jaden, Chumley." she said with a voice full of authority as she turned to face her hero with sword in hand "Make way."

The two young men followed her command on instinct, while Syrus watched in awe Alexis walked towards him with purpose and grace, like a real queen should. She stopped when she was 3 ft in front of him "Syrus, place your right fist on your heart and kneel." He obeyed. "Now, repeat after me."

Alexis: I, Syrus Truesdale, do solemnly swear.

Syrus: I, Syrus Truesdale, do solemnly swear.

Alexis: That from this day, until my last.

Syrus: That from this day, until my last.

Alexis: That I, will faithfully serve, protect and defend.

Syrus: That I, will faithfully serve, protect and defend.

Alexis: My Queen, Alexis Rhodes.

Syrus: My Queen, Alexis Rhodes.

Alexis: That in her name, I will defeat any foe.

Syrus: That in her name, I will defeat any foe.

Alexis: With courage, strength and honor.

Syrus: With courage, strength and honor.

Alexis: That in her name, I will best any challenge.

Syrus: That in her name, I will best any challenge.

Alexis: No matter how great, or many.

Syrus: No matter how great, or many.

Alexis: So help me God.

Syrus: So help me God.

"Whoa, they got this whole thing down pat. It's like they rehearsed this or something." Jaden commented as Chumley nodded in agreement.

Alexis then raised the sword to the heavens, it's dull blade shining bright in the mourning sun "Then, by the power vested in me, before god and all witnesses, I name tee, Sir Syrus Truesdale!" she declared as she tapped both his shoulder with the sword "The Knight of Slifer Red! Now my knight, Rise."

Syrus gladly obeyed his new liege, and even though he was still barely over 4 ft, he seemed to stand much taller then before. And a familiar fire returned to his eye.

Jaden smiled proudly "Chumley my friend, I think we just saw the beginning of a legend."
1213222111111.title: A Queen's kiss for her Knight and a Kinght's oath.

choices: Tag Team Duel just like in canon.
Solo Duel with Zane.
Skip the duel and get to the victory video chat.
12132221111111.content:
It was about a week since that fateful night and now Alexis was walking down the pier with a bit more pep in her step then usual, which may have caused her ever growing breasts (now W-cup as of today) to bounce and jiggle pretty wildly, but for once she didn't care. She was madly love and would shout it to the world if she could. But she knew that if she did it would cause a world of problems, both for her and Syrus.

She knew that she was the most sought after bachelorette in the whole school, with literal legions of boys ready to fight each other tooth and nail if that is what it would take to have a chance with her. And if any of them heard that Syrus was the one who stole her heart, they would tear her little hero limb from limb. So as much as she would love to tell everyone she knew that she was happily off the market, it was for the best that she and Syrus kept their new love a secret.

Which was getting harder to do since Syrus kept giving her more reasons for her to love him. Just 2 days ago Chumley's father came to take him home because he believed that his son was a failure as a duelist. And he wasn't wrong unfortunately, Chumley was a great friend, but a poor strategist. It didn't help that he had some of the worst grades in the whole school. But thanks to both Jaden and Syrus sticking up for their friend, they managed to convince Chumley's father that if his son defeated him in a duel the next day, then he would be allowed to stay.

That was going to be a tall order, if not out right impossible since Chumley's father was a State Champion Duelist who was famous for taking out all of his opponents Life Points in one turn. So you could imagine that as Syrus told her about all this in a video chat Alexis honestly felt it was a lost cause to try and help Chumley win.

But Syrus just smiled and said "I think Chumley might surprise you. Me and Jaden have given him some cards that will make his deck a force to be reckoned with. And I been giving him some pointers on how to use them properly. Come and see the duel tomorrow, I guarantee you'll be amazed!"

And Syrus proved to be a man of his word as Alexis bore witness to one of the most intense duels she'd ever seen. Chumley battled his father with everything he had and then some, and thanks to the cards his friends gave him as well as Syrus's coaching, the heavy weight underdog managed to pull off the impossible and defeat his father in a down to the wire Duel Monster slugfest.

Through all the hugs, cheers and tears of joy being thrown around at the incredible feat, the moment that really stuck out to her was when Chumley's father walked up to Syrus with a smile full of respect and said..

"Kid, I don't know how you did it, but you managed to turn my son from a hopeless rookie into an underground champion. I say underground since this duel wasn't really official, because if it was my son would actually be State Champion right now! HAHAHAHA!! Maybe this school can't teach my son, but you sure can! And if what my son can do now is any indication of what your capable of, then I can't wait for you to make it to the big leagues and duel you myself! And loser buys drinks afterwords! What do you say?!" the tower of muscle of a man asked the pint sized wonder with an extended fist.

Syrus gave his new rival smile of his own and bumped fists with him "Deal!"

To see her knight be recognized by a legitimate pro duelist was a moment that she would cherish forever. In fact, it took every bit of willpower and self-control she had to not tackle him to the floor and kiss the living daylights out of him. Plus, it could be her imagination, but she swore that her breasts were growing even faster then usual ever since they started secretly dating. But she actually didn't so much anymore since she knew that Syrus liked it. He liked it very much.

If fact, she had been telling him all about her growth history in their nightly video chats. From when she got her first bra when she was 11, all the way to the point where she was right now, all the while Syrus would jerk off to her literally burying her I-phone into her vast cleavage. It was becoming their favorite thing to do together.

As to why she was at the pier well, aside from the abandoned dorm it was one of the most private places on the island. Nobody really came here unless they were coming in from ferry or leaving. Plus she found the sound of the waves to be very relaxing. But it seemed that she wasn't alone as she saw through the fog the familiar silhouette of Zane Truesdale, The Undefeated Champion of Duel Academy, Number 1 student, and Syrus's older brother.

"Zane? What are you doing out here?" she asked as she walked up to the man who was like a second big brother to her.

"Nothing, I just felt like being alone, much like you I suspect." he said calmly "I can leave though if you would like."

"No that's okay, I don't mind you being here." As they stood together in silence for a few minutes a question came to Alexis that she had been meaning to ask him for a while "You know, you've been more with withdrawn then usual since your brother enrolled here, why is that?"

"That's not really any of your business." he said rather coldly "All I can say about my brother is that he doesn't belong here."

"That's not true!" she defended her secret love instinctively before she could stop herself.

Zane turned to her with a look of puzzlement on his normally infallible face. He wasn't just surprised by her sudden outburst, but also the fact that she looked like she was barely stopping herself from slapping in the face. He gave her a hard stare "And what do you know about my brother?"

"Only that he is far more capable then you give him credit for. In fact, I would go even so far as to say he could beat you."

Now hearing that really caught him off guard. Alexis knew better then most how good he was, so to hear her say that there was actually someone is this school that could beat him, his own brother in fact?! It sounded so absurd that it almost made him laugh. But that look in her eye stopped him from doing so, she was so sure, like there was no doubt in her mind whatsoever in what she said.

She then turned to walk away "You want to be alone, fine. But don't ever talk like that about Syrus in front of me again." she said with a chilling voice.

As she stormed away Zane was left with much to ponder.

(The Next Mourning)

"Expelled/Expelled?!" both Syrus and Jaden cried out in shock.

Barely an hour ago The Disciplinary Action Squad came storming into their room stating that they were under campus arrest. And now they stood before a room full of monitors that show all of the important faculty members looming over them like judges for a trail.

"That is what I suggest." stated The Captain Of The Disciplinary Action Squad. "You trespassed into the abandoned dorm! An anonymous letter from one of our faculty members confirms it. You must be punished so an example is set for all of the students."

"But what kind of example are we setting?" interjected a strangely smug looking Dr. Crowler "That we are a bunch of hard hearted tyrants? I say we arrange something more sporting."

"Sporting? What do you mean?" Syrus asked nervously.

"Well Syrus, I propose you partner up with Jaden in a Tag Duel. Win and your both cleared, lose your expelled."

"A Tag Duel? That sounds sweet!" Jaden said eagerly.

But Syrus didn't share his best friend's enthusiasm "I don't know.."

*knock knock*

"Hm?" Crowler looked into the backround of his office hearing a knock on his door "Hold on a minute please, don't end without me." His monitor went static for a few minutes and when he came back he was even more smug looking then before "Well, it appears you might have another option."

"Really?"

"Yes dear Syrus, just now I had a lovely chat with a third party who was rather intrigued by this whole affair and proposed to me that, you could instead participate in Solo Duel where you could clear both of your names yourself if you win. However, if you lose, not only will you be expelled, but you will are to put away your decks and never duel again!"

Syrus and Jaden were horrified by such choice "Who would I be dueling?!" Syrus dared to ask.

"Your brother Zane."

Hearing that name sent a chill down everyones spine like it was the name of the grim reaper himself. But none more so then Syrus who looked like he was about to have a panic attack. But just before he pasted out Jaden placed a comforting hand on his shoulder.

"Sy, remember your oath."

Those words brought much needed stability to the young duelist. He closed his eyes, took a deep breath, and repeated oath to himself in his head. With his mind clear and his heart burning with determination, he made his choice.
12132221111111.title: No good deed goes unpunished.

choices: Syrus vs Zane!
Skip the duel. (Reader's choice if Syrus wins or not)
121322211111112.content:
It was a daring, most would say insane choice. It was a choice that he never in a million years would even think about making a week ago. But things were different now, he was different. But before he announced his choice, he gave Jaden meaningful look "Jay, are you sure you want me to choose?" he asked heavily.

Jaden just gave him his trademark grin "Of course! This is your show now! And whether I'm dueling with you or cheering you on from the sidelines, I'll support you all the way!"

Syrus's eyes teared up a little as he thanked god for giving him the best friend he could ever ask for. He dried his tears and faced the judges with a fire in his eye "I choose to duel Zane!"

All of the faculty members looked at the short young man like he just grew a second head, all except Crowler who's smug smile threatened to split his face "Are you certain? You have one chance to change your mind."

Syrus remained steadfast "I'll duel Zane! AND I'LL WIN!!!" he declared with all his might.

Crowler felt like Christmas had come early this year "Very well then! If no one has any objections?" he asked the rest of his peers.

"If the boy is that eager to throw away any career he has as a duelist, then I say let him." said one teacher with shades.

"Perhaps this will set an even better example then just expulsion, I agree wholeheartedly." said The Captain.

All the other faculty members gave their agreements, all except Chancellor Shepard who looked at Syrus for any sign of hesitation, doubt or fear in his eyes. He found none, and that filled him with pride to see one of his students was willing to risk it all. Because sometimes that is what you do when you play Duel Monsters. "Good luck Syrus." he said with a smile.

Knowing that at least one of the teachers believed in him did Syrus a world of good for his resolve "Thank you sir." he said with a grateful bow.

"Then It's settled! In 1 week Syrus Truesdale will battle Zane Truesdale for the chance to see if he and Jaden both stay at this academy and keep their decks! Since this is such an important duel, on the day of the event all classes will be cancelled so all students can attend!" Shepard declared "Meeting adjourned!"

And with that the monitors went black and exit door opened for Syrus and Jaden to leave.

"Come on Jaden, I've got a duel to prepare for."

"I'm right behind ya!"

(Meanwhile in Crowler's office)

"So, I trust you are satisfied with this?" Crowler asked the third party.

That third party turned out to be Zane himself. When he heard that Syrus had trespassed at the abandoned dorm, and he knew that Alexis visited that cursed place to pay her respects to her missing brother, he began to piece together that something happen between them there. He wasn't sure what and didn't want to assume anything, but whatever it was, it was big. It had to be, because there was no other explanation for Alexis's sudden faith in Syrus's skills in dueling.

Or Syrus's sudden growth in backbone. He heard his little brother's declaration loud and clear over the monitor, and he almost didn't recognized him without the usual timidness in his voice. His brother had change somehow. And when he dueled him in a week he would see for himself how much.

"Yes sir. Now if you'll excuse." he said with a polite bow as walked out the door.

(1 week later)

The seats in The Academy Stadium were packed for this duel, or as they would like to say execution. We turn our focus to one group that were have a discussion that summed up pretty much everyone's thoughts about what was happening.

"Man, this is the best day ever! Not only are we able to skip class today, but we get some free entertainment!

"Yeah Zane's going to slaughter that little Slifer!

"I kind of feel bad for him though. Having his own brother basically kicking him out of school and never being able to duel again? It's pretty heartbreaking don't you think?"

"Yeah, well it's his own fault for trespassing at the abandoned dorm in the first place. And he was even given the choice to fight in a Tag duel with that Jaden kid instead, and he choose this instead!"

"Yeah I guess your right. The poor guy signed his own death warrant there."

The only people who didn't think like that group of jerks were Alexis, Jaden, Chumley and even the rest of the Slifer dorm. Now when they heard about Syrus's duel with Zane they also didn't think Syrus stood a chance. But they slowly changed their tune as throughout the whole week whenever he had free time he would battle Jaden, Alexis, even Chumley in no holds barred practice duels to prepare for today.

Jaden and Alexis were especially tough opponents that pushed Syrus to his limits and beyond. And Chumley proved that he was really starting to take dueling seriously again as even he proved himself a capable sparing partner that could give him a run for his money, and he only got better with each duel. And with each victory in Syrus's favor more and more of the Slifer's started to believe that maybe, just maybe, he could do it.

Plus Syrus had spent hours preparing his deck for Zane, as well as reviewing all he knew about how Zane dueled. He knew better then anyone that Zane's deck was full of powerful cards, but that's not what made him the best. He was the best because he knew how to play every single one of them. That's why he has never been beaten.

But Syrus had one thing in his corner, he knew better then anyone how powerful Zane's go to strategy was. It had laid waste to countless duelists and never failed him. And that was what Syrus was banking on, because he knew the one way to shatter Zane's nigh unbeatable play. It was risky, damn near suicide, but it was his only hope.

The Stadium chatter began to quiet as Chancellor Shepard stepped into the middle of the ring with microphone in hand. "I would like to first welcome and thank all students and faculty members who have come to attend this event! And with that said, with further delay, let's bring out our duelist!"

The crowd cheered in a agreement as the two brothers walked into the ring from opposing sides.

The crowed was especially excited to see Zane as you could hear whole tribes of fan girls screaming their lungs out their love for him, and pleas for him to marry them and have his children.

Meanwhile with Syrus the crowd was laughing and jeering at him, saying things like "It was nice knowing ya!", "Try to at least make past your first turn little guy!", "Go riddance to ya, Slifer filth!". The only exceptions being the whole Slifer dorm who had a banner and flags saying things like "Go Sy!" "You Got This!" "You Rock!".

And of course his secret girlfriend Alexis that he spotted among the crowd. She had warm smile and eyes full of faith. And she mouthed only one word to him that he could read loud and clear.

"Win!"

And that is exactly what he planned to do!
121322211111112.title: A Knight Always Keeps His Word.

choices: Syrus vs Zane, Part 2! (winning route)
Syrus vs Zane, Part2! (Disaster strikes)
1213222111111121.content:
The brother's met in the center of the ring with Shepard standing between them.

"Alright gentlemen, I'm sure you both understand the rules of the game. I expect a tough, but clean duel. Any signs of cheating will be met with immediate disqualification." he said formally "Now, shake hands and lets begin."

Syrus and Zane stared each other down for a few seconds before the elder brother offered his hand "Give it you best shot Syrus." he said calmly.

Syrus narrowed his eyes at his brother's choice of words. It was like that was all he could ever hope for, "giving it his best shot." He'll show him. The younger sibling grasped the offered hand and gave it a strong shake "Thanks, but I would much rather win." he replied with steel in his voice.

For a split second Zane's eyes widened at his little brother's response before narrowing as well. If that's the way Syrus wanted it, then he wasn't going to hold back. With the handshake broken the duelists walked to their sides of the ring as Shepard left the field to join his peers in the stands.

(Meanwhile in the stands)

"Wow, did you hear what that shorty just said?!" Mindy asked in disbelief.

"I sure did. He's got guts talking to Zane like that I give him that much, but he doesn't have a snowball's chance in hell of wining." Jazzmine said with her arms crossed in certainty.

"Don't be so sure." Alexis stated much to their shock.

"What?! Oh come on Lex, you don't honestly think that pipsqueak is anywhere close to Zane's level do you?!" Jazz asked hoping that one of her best friends wasn't going crazy.

"I'm just saying, in a duel anything can happen." she said shrugging her shoulders, causing her bigger then her own head sized melons to jiggle under her tight uniform. "I've gone up against him myself a few times over the last week, and he's more then held his own. He may surprise you."

"Whoa, really?!" Mindy asked in amazement as she turn her attention back to the duel about to begin. She knew that anyone who could get praise from Alexis was worth keeping your eye out for.

Jazz on the other hand scoffed as she wasn't convinced "Yeah? I'll believe that when I see it."

Alexis just smiled to herself [Oh trust me Jazz, you will.]

(Back at the duel)

With their duel desks ready and their hands full the brothers began their duel!

Syrus LP:4000
Zane LP:4000

Syrus made the the first draw.

Syrus's Hand: Gyroid, Steamroid, Steam Gyroid, Monster Reborn, Double Summon, Pot of Greed.

"First, I play Pot of Greed!"

2 new cards were added to his hand and they were Submarineroid and Call of the Haunted.

"Then I set a monster face-down in defense mode, and end my turn by placing 1 card face down!"

Zane's expression soured upon seeing his brother's timid play.

"What happened to all that bravado Syrus? I thought you were gonna come at me head on, but you are hiding behind face-down cards already."

Syrus laughed aloud at this, surprising most of the audience with the fact that he didn't quail from such a tongue-lashing.

"Yeah, I did say that, but I'm not gonna be stupid about it. We still have to get your opening move out of the way, and I'd rther not leave a monster in attack mode to let my life points get blasted by Cyber Dragon. It's just sad how many people have let you clean them out that way."

Zane smirked, a rare sight for those who knew him well.

"You've got a lot of cheek today Sy, but have it your way. I activate Mystical Space Typhoon!"

And with that Call of the Haunted was blown away.

"Now, with your face-down out of the way, I summon Cyber Dragon in Attack Mode!"

Cyber Dragon ATK:2100

Normally you had to pay tribute to summon a level 5 monster like Cyber Dragon, but it's special effect allowed one to special summon it so long as only your opponent had monsters on the field. An effect that Zane capitalized on with master level precision.

"Now Cyber Dragon attack his face-down with Strident Blast!"

The mechanical dragon blasted the face-down monster, which was revealed to be Syrus's cartoonish helicopter Gyroid, who's effect stopped it from being destroyed.

"Gyroid is a decent wall Syrus, but you know it will only stop a basic Cyber Dragon. You better upgrade it before my next card finishes resolving. I end my turn by playing the spell card Different Dimension Capsule!"

To all watching in the stands hearing that sentence meant this duel was over. That card allowed Zane to pick any card from his deck, place it in the capsule, and in 2 turns he can remove it from the capsule and add it to his hand. This strategy was the worst nightmare of any duelist who challenged Zane. Many had tried to counter or brave it, but all failed. And nearly everyone watching was certain that Syrus was only going to be another name on the mile long list of people Zane has defeated.

"Your move Syrus."

Syrus vowed to prove them all wrong as he made his draw, and he saw the one he needed.

"I play another Pot of Greed!"

And with 2 more cards added they came out as Emergency Provisions and Earthquake. Syrus smirked as he knew it was time to show everyone, especially Zane, that he meant business.

"Then I summon Steamroid in Attack Mode!"

Steamroid ATK:1800

"Next I play Double Summon in order to summon in Defense Mode Submarineroid!"

Submarineroid DEF:1800

"Get ready Zane, because Steamroid's effect increases it's ATK by 500 when attacks a monster! And Submarineroid allows me to attack your Life Points directly! Steamroid, turn Cyber Dragon to scrap! And Submarineroid, Fire Torpedo!"

Steamroid ATK:1800-2300

The Vehicroid's carried out their commands with gusto, all the while stood unflinching as he witness his dragon blowing to bits and a sentient ballistic weapon hit him in the face.

Zane LP:4000-3000

"And I end my turn by setting a card, then playing Emergency Provisions!"

Syrus sent his face-down Earthquake to add the extra Life Points he needed to make it clear to everyone that he was in this to win. And nothing will stop him from doing just that.

Syrus LP: 4000-5000

"Your move Zane."

(Meanwhile in the stands)

Just about everyone watching was stunned speechless by what they just witnessed, except for the Slifers who were going nuts cheering for their underdog hero. In one turn not only did Syrus destroy Zane's dragon, but now he had 3 monsters on his side, each with effects that gave him a solid balance of attack and defense. But most amazing of all was that he had more Life Points then Zane.

"Holy shit!/Holy shit!" both Jazz and Mindy shouted in pure astonishment.

"I told you." Alexis said casually, like what she just saw was a normal occurrence.

"Okay..I'll admit it..He's good." was Jazz could say.

"Really good." Mindy added

Alexis smirked [You haven't seen anything yet.] She knew her man was just getting started.

(Back at the Duel)

While his cool face didn't show it, Zane was just as amazed as everyone else from Syrus incredible display. "So, you really are trying to beat me aren't you?" he asked calmly.

Syrus's looked his brother dead in the eye and said "No trying about it. I'm GOING to beat you!" he stated like it was a fact.

It was in this moment that for all those who came today expecting a one sided slaughter now realized that instead, they were about to witness a war.
1213222111111121.title: The Battle Of The Brothers, Part 1!

choices: Syrus vs Zane, part 3 (stay on winning path)
Syrus vs Zane, (switch to losing path)
12132221111111211.content:
Syrus LP:5000
Zane LP:3000

As Zane made his draw he allowed a small smile on his face as he now understood how much Syrus had changed. He still wasn't sure how, but whatever happened to him had turned him into something, someone, that he had been waiting for a long time.

A worthy rival.

"A bold claim Syrus, let's see if you can back it up. With no monsters on my side I can summon another Cyber Dragon."

Sure enough another dragon emerged.

"Or better yet 2, I play Monster Reborn!"

And with that Zane had 2 dragons to test his little brother, but not for long.

"You've made very impressive progress Syrus, but you still have a lot to learn. Now I activate Polymerization to fuse my dragons together to create Cyber Twin Dragon!"

Cyber Twin Dragon ATK:2800

A powerful monster with an equally powerful special effect, with 2 heads it can attack twice per turn.

"Now, Cyber Twin Dragon attack Steamroid and Submarineroid with Double Strident Blast!"

Syrus was glad he used Emergency Provisions that last turn, because while he wasn't taking any damage from Submarineroid getting destroyed, he was getting nailed by Steamroid losing 500 ATK due to being attacked.

Syrus LP:5000-3500

"Also don't forget Syrus, by next turn the capsule will open. And by then it will be over." he stated with certainty.

Such a statement would've scared Syrus so much that he would've surrendered on the spot 2 weeks ago and more then likely piss himself. But not anymore, he was done being scared. And the only way he was losing is when his Life Points reached zero.

"I haven't forgotten about that capsule Zane. I know what's in there and so does everyone else. But guess what, I don't care. Because I'm not going to let you use it." the short Slifer declared boldly.

"Oh really? And how do you plan to do that?" the undefeated duelist asked while raising an intrigued eyebrow.

"Let me show you!" Syrus shouted as he made his draw "I play my last Pot of Greed!"

2 more cards added and the underdog hero smirked as they turned out to be the cards he needed to win.

"Next I play Monster Reborn in order to bring back from the scrap heap Steamroid! And then I activate Power Bond!"

Hearing that unexpected play actually caused Zane's eyes to widen in shock.

"That's right Zane, I'm using your own trump card against you! You all know how it works, with it I can fuse machine type monsters and the monster they create will have double their original ATK! Sure I'll suffer recoil damage equal to my monsters original ATK at the end of my turn, but it's worth it to stop your so called unbeatable strategy dead in it's tracks! Now Steamroid and Gyroid, come together to form Steam Gyriod!"

Syrus's Vechroids smirked as they help him carry out his master plan, fusing together to become what will finally knock Zane of his pedestal.

Steam Gyroid ATK:2200-4400

"Now Steam Gyroid, attack with Train Twister!"

Steam Gyroid smirked as it spun it's turbines to created a twister of smoke and soot to blind and trap the mighty dragon, and from within the twister the train/helicopter charged to smash the dragon to pieces. This mighty attack actually caused Zane to take a step back and instinctively shield himself from the debris.

Zane LP:3000-1400

Zane and the rest of the audience looked at Syrus with complete shock, as he just pulled off what so many duelists have tried and failed to do. Use his own unbeatable strategy against him.

"And now I end my turn by placing 1 card face down! Your move Zane!"

Syrus LP:3500-1200

Duel Academy's top student was still in a state of shock for a few seconds before he regained his composure. "I have to admit, that was very well played Syrus. But you do realize that it will only take one good attack to finish off the rest of your Life Points."

Even with that fact Syrus wasn't worried "I know. But I also know that since I took out most of your Cyber Dragons you don't have any monsters in your deck that you can use to defeat my Steam Gyroid."

"Then it seems I must find another solution, and in that case, DRAW!." Zane called out as for the first time in who knows how long his blood started to pump hotly in excitement. The Different Dimension Capsule then emerged from the ground and added Power Bond to his hand. "I set two cards and then activate Emergency Provisions!" Since he could no longer use them, he set De-Fusion and Power Bond from his hand and then sent them to the graveyard in order to prepare himself for anything else Syrus could throw at him, since was now clear to him that he couldn't afford to let his guard down with him.

Zane LP:1400-3400

"Then I activate Smashing Ground to destroy the monster on your side of the field with the highest DEF!"

A huge draconic foot appeared form a portal and crushed Steam Gyroid. Syrus gasped in horror as his best monster was destroyed, but there was nothing he could do.

"Unfortunately I have no monsters, so you get to last one more turn Syrus."

Syrus made his draw, but only came up with Cycroid, which wasn't strong enough to risk putting in attack mode. "I play one monster face-down and end my turn."

Zane made his draw and was delighted to see Negate Attack. "Still no monster, but I place 1 card face down and end my turn."

Syrus made his draw. "Now we're talking! "I summon Drillroid and use it to attack you directly for game!"

"Not so fast little bro, I activate Negate Attack!"

Syrus growled in annoyance as Drillroid's charge was stopped in it's tracks "I end my turn!"

The tension in the stadium was so thick you could cut it with a knife. What was once thought by nearly everyone going to be a quick, but entertaining ass kicking turned into a full on battle between equals in every way. Even though Zane had an overwhelmingly powerful deck that only needed one good draw to explode, Syrus proved to be an unpredictable opponent that had tons of tricks up his sleeve. This match honestly could go either way.

Only Alexis remind steadfast in her belief that Syrus could pull off the impossible again.

"Draw!" Zane shouted as he was starting to sweat a little "I now play my own Pot Of Greed!" And with the 2 cards that he drew, Zane knew this duel was over. "Syrus, you were the best opponent I ever dueled. I'm so proud of you." he said with a sincere smile. But then he returned to regular cool demeanor "But now, it's over. You lost."
12132221111111211.title: The Battle Of The Brothers, Part 2!

choices: Syrus vs Zane: The Finale! (Syrus Wins)
Syrus vs Zane: The Finale! (Syrus Loses)
121322211111112111.content:
Syrus LP:1200
Zane LP:3400

Syrus started to sweat nervously a little at Zane's proclamation and once he saw the card his brother played a very cold wave of fear washed over him.

"I summon my final Cyber Dragon, and then I summon my Cyber Phoenix."

The final mechanical dragon in Zane's deck roared as it appeared, and a mechanical bird-like creature screeched as it joined it, putting a total of 3300 attack points on Zane's field.

"Cyber Dragon, destroy Drillroid with Strident Blast."

Just like that, Drillroid disappeared in a flash of blue.

Syrus LP: 1200 - 700

"Now Cyber Phoenix, attack his face-down."

The metallic phoenix dived at Syrus's face-down monster, shredding Cycroid to pieces.As the pieces of the hologram dropped to the floor and faded, Syrus stared at his brother stoned face for a few seconds before lowering his head in what appeared to be defeat, his sky-blue hair shielding his eyes from view.

Seeing his little brother in such a sorry state broke his heart, especially after such a hard fought duel. And he knew that if he lost the he would never be able to duel again. Those were the conditions that he and Crowler agreed to when he proposed this duel. But it would be a complete waste to have such skill just thrown away. And besides, he was his big brother, it was time he started to act like it.

"Chancellor Shepard!" Zane called out "I am well aware of the conditions of what will happen by Syrus surrendering, and I am aware that Syrus did commit a serious crime on this campus. But I believe that it would be an even greater crime to all of Duel Monsters if Syrus is forced to never duel again. So please, allow Syrus the right to keep dueling at the very least."

This day was just full of surprises for everyone watching. Zane pleading with the faculty to show leniency for his opponent? But then again it made sense, after all it was his little brother. And he did put up a valiant effort, better then anyone who came before him to face Zane. Plus, this was the big man on campus himself asking for a favor, that had to mean something right?

And it did, the teachers talked it out for a minute before coming to an agreement that Syrus should be allowed to keep dueling. Such talent was rare and needed to be allowed to flourish.

Zane smiled in relief at the good news "There Syrus, now you won't-"

"No.."

Zane blinked in surprise as he turned back to face his little brother, his head still bowed.

"This duel isn't over.."

Zane was in complete shock, but then he shook it off to try and reason with his surprisingly stubborn little brother. "Syrus, it's alright. You don't have to worry about-"

"Finish your turn Zane.."

"Syrus that's enough. It's over."

"No it isn't."

"You can't beat me!"

"Yes I can!"

"There is no risk in losing anymore! It's pointless to keep trying to win!"

"It's not pointless to me!"

"WHY?!"

"BECAUSE I'M TIRED OF LOSING TO YOU!!"

Just when Zane thought that Syrus couldn't surprise him anymore then he already has, he was left speechless as his little brother glared at him with eyes welling with tears. Tears from a life full of pain, frustration and jealousy at his big brother, yet at same time with love and admiration for him.

"I know people tell you all the time that your amazing Zane, but they really don't know the half of it!" he said as the tears flowed freely "You aren't just strong, smart, talented and handsome, you're also earnest and ambitious! You don't want to just coast through life on just your god given talents, you want to push yourself to be the best! And even though you've never lost to anyone, you never talk down to or belittle your opponents! Instead you give them much needed advice on how to improve and set an example for them to follow! You aren't just amazing Zane, your larger then life! Do you have any idea how big of a shadow you cast?! Well I do! BECAUSE I LIVED IN THAT SHADOW FOR MY ENTIRE FUCKING LIFE!!"

Zane didn't know what to say or think as Syrus unleashed all of his pent up feelings for him, both good and bad.

"From the very second I came into this world, it was clear that the only thing we had in common was that we have the same parents and love for Duel Monsters! I'm short, clumsy and easily frightened! Which made me a prime target for petty assholes who wanted to get to you by picking on me! And anytime I ever stood up for myself I always failed, which meant you always had to come in and save me! Even now for the teachers, you're making a case to let me keep dueling! And they allow it because your Zane Fucking Trusedale! And the only accomplishment I'll ever get in my life is that 'I put up a good fight against Zane Fucking Truesdale'! WELL I'M TIRED OF IT!! I'M SICK AND FUCKING TIRED OF ALWAYS BEING IN THE SHADOW OF THE GREAT ZANE FUCKING TRUSEDALE!! I DIDN'T CHOOSE TO DUEL YOU TO CLEAR MY NAME OR KEEP MY RIGHT TO DUEL!!! I CHOOSE TO DUEL YOU SO I CAN FINALLY BEAT YOU!!! AND AS LONG AS I STILL HAVE LIFE POINTS LEFT, AS LONG AS I STILL HAVE CARDS IN MY DECK, THAT IS EXACTLY WHAT I'M GOING TO DO!!! NOW FINISH YOUR FUCKING TURN ZANE!! BECAUSE THIS DUEL ISN'T OVER!!"

The only sound that could be heard in the whole stadium was the Syrus's heavy breathing as he finished his rant. Nobody knew what to think of, what to feel or what to do with all they just learned from the young underdog's heartbreaking, yet inspiring speech.

All except Jaden and Chumley as they both shared a look and a solemn nod before standing from their seats. "Syrus! Syrus! Syrus!"
they chanted together in support for their friend. Soon the rest of the Slifer dorm joined in the chant, and before long the whole stadium chanted his name in support for his seemingly impossible task.

Syrus stared at the crowd in disbelief, not long ago just about everyone here but a select few believed in him. Now the same people who laughed at him when he stepped into the ring were chanting his name.

Meanwhile Zane stared at his little brother in awe. It was now clear to him who much this duel really meant to his little brother, and his sheer fighting spirit inspired all of his naysayers to support him.

He couldn't be prouder.

"Well in that case, I end my turn! Your move Syrus!" Zane shouted with an excited smile. His announcement made the crowd cheer loudly as they would get to see the ultimate victor of this incredible duel.

Syrus looked back at his brother with wide eyes. He had never seen a smile that big on his face before. But as he registered what Zane said he wiped his tears and gave a smile of his own.

"Okay then! Let's go!" Syrus shouted as he made his draw, his smiled widened when he saw what card he now had.
121322211111112111.title: The Battle Of The Brothers, Part 3

choices: Alexis has a pole in her room! She going to give him a pole dance!
Alexis is not alone! Jazz and Mindy are also waiting for him in sexy underwear!
Alexis is covered in whipped cream and fruits! She made herself a dessert!
1213222111111121111.content:
"I play one card face-down. It may not seem like it, but this card is gonna be the nail in your coffin," Syrus proclaimed confidently, "I end my turn there."

"Bold words for someone on their very last legs. I draw!" Zane declared.

After looking at his card, Zane gave a grim smile.

"Sorry Syrus, but it looks like your card won't help you at all. Cyber Phoenix will stop most traps, but just in case that's something really nasty, I activate Mystical Space Typhoon to destroy it."

The infamous vortex materialized on Zane's field and went barreling towards Syrus's face-down card. However, Syrus hit the activation button on his duel disk.

"Sorry Zane, but that won't help you against this trap. I activate Necro Fusion. This allows me to fusion summon by removing materials from my graveyard. I remove Submarineroid, Steamroid, and Drillroid to summon my very best monster, Super Vehicroid Jumbo Drill.

A colossal version of Drillroid with claws and a submarine tower and a grille below the drill appeared on the field, the attack meter displaying a glowing 3000.

"I can't attack with it the turn I summon it with Necro Fusion, but since it is your turn, that doesn't matter."

Zane was force to end his turn, as none of his monsters could match the giant drill. Syrus drew his final card and breathed a sigh of relief.

"I play Limiter Removal, and you know what that means Zane. My Jumbo Drill's attack points double to 6000. Super Vehicroid Jumbo Drill, run that damn Cyber Dragon down."

Syrus's ace monster did as instructed and ran into Cyber Dragon full force. The shockwave from the dragon's explosion forced Zane to his knees as his Life Point counter dropped to zero.

Zane LP: 3400 - 0

Stunned silence was all that could be heard throughout the stadium, as barely anyone could believe what they just saw. Zane Trusedale, The Undefeated Champion Of Duel Academy, had just been defeated. By a first year Slifer no less.

Even Syrus couldn't believe what he just managed to pull off. For the longest time it seemed that his dream of surpassing his brother would always be just that, a dream. But he did it, he actually beat Zane.

"THAT'S GAME!!!" Jaden shouted his catch phrase with glee as he ran to congratulate his best friend, with the rest of his dorm not far behind. "Way to go Sy!" he exclaimed as he gave his short friend a strong pat on the back.

This knocked Syrus out of his stunned stupor "I..I did it..?" he asked softly.

"You sure did buddy! Man I can't wait to duel you again myself after this!" Jaden said with barely contained excitement.

"No way! You already dueled with him this morning, it's my turn!" Chumley interjected.

Before the entire Slifer dorm could start to argue over who would get to duel Syrus, Zane, Chancellor Shepard and the rest of the faculty approached the short underdog victor.

Zane had a proud smile as he offered his hand to his little brother "Well done Syrus. It seems I still have a lot to learn about dueling." he said.

Syrus stared at his big brother with disbelief for a few seconds before giving him a smile of his own while shaking his hand "I only won because of everything I learned from you over the years." he replied humbly.

Zane just smiled as he walked off to find some privacy. After that intense duel, as well as everything he learned from it about himself and Syrus, he had some soul searching to do.

Chancellor Shepard had a proud smile of his own as he said "Syrus, that was one of the greatest duels this academy has ever seen. Today you have show everyone here one of the most fundamental truths of Duel Monsters. And that is, as long as you still have Life Points left, play your cards right, and never give up, victory is always possible. And for your victory, you and Jaden Yuki are allowed to continue your education here. But I think that you also deserve a personal reward for your efforts as well, wouldn't you all agree?" he asked his peers behind him.

They all gave their approval for this statement. Even Crowler, petty elitist snob that he is, couldn't deny that Syrus deserved to be here and be acknowledged for his skills.

Shepard turned his attention back to Syrus "By defeating Zane you have proven yourself to be the top duelist in this academy. So, it is only fitting that you have the rank to match your new status. Syrus Truesdale, I here by promote you to Obelisk Blue!" he declared.

Syrus was floored at this announcement. Him, an Obelisk?! That would mean his own room, five star class meals for breakfast, lunch and dinner and many other luxuries that came with being among the elite. And maybe, he wouldn't have to hide the fact that he and Alexis were dating anymore.

He looked towards his girlfriend in the stands, a beautiful warm smile full of pride on her lovely face. He thought about all the things they would be able to do together as fellow Obelisk's. Sitting together in class, secretly holding hands during lessons, sharing meals in the dinning hall, sneaking into each others rooms at night. It sounded like a dream come true!

But then he turned to look at his friends Jaden and Chumley. They just gave him understanding smiles and nods of acceptance. Sure it was going to suck not having him at the dorm anymore, but that didn't mean that they still couldn't hang out. Besides they knew Syrus earned his promotion, so it wouldn't be right for them to hold him back just because they would miss having him around.

Syrus then stared at the ground deep in thought for a minute before turning back to the headmaster "Sir, I'm honored that you think I'm ready to be an Obelisk, but I can't accept this promotion." he said solemnly.

Shepard and the rest of the faculty did a double take at the young man's statement "Whatever do you mean?"

"Just because I defeated Zane once doesn't automatically make me a better duelist then him. Besides, thinking back on it, there was a number of ways I could have done that duel better. But I was so focused on beating Zane that I didn't think about them. Honestly, I was lucky I won at all. And on top of that my grades are just above-average at best, so I think it would be best if I stay a Slifer for now." he explained.

Shepard didn't think this young man could surprise him anymore today then he already did, but he showed great maturity and integrity in his reasoning, so Shepard accepted it "Very well, I understand. But still I'm sure there must be something you would like for your hard earned victory." he insisted.

Syrus crossed his arms and closed his eyes in deep thought for a moment as ideas came to him "Well..if it's not too much trouble, our dorm could use a fresh coat of paint. And better air conditioning and heating. Maybe some pest control for the cockroaches and rats while your at it."

Shepard sweat dropped at the list of problems with the Slifer dormitory [How long has it been since anyone did basic maintenance on that place?] he thought with embarrassment.

Jaden wrapped a brotherly arm around Syrus's shoulder "Hey, how about we have a BBQ to celebrate?" he asked excitedly.

"Now that sounds totally licious!" Chumley exclaimed happily with a bit of drool leaking from his lips.

Shepard smiled widely "An excellent idea! Everyone, there is victory BBQ at the Slifer dorm tonight and you're all invited!" he shouted for all to hear.

Nearly the whole stadium cheered at this news as they now all started to chant Syrus's name again as the Slifer's carried him like a rock star back to the dorm.

(Meanwhile with Alexis)

"Syrus! Syrus! Syrus!" Mindy chanted excitedly with everyone else as she followed the crowd as they carried the new champion away. Alexis wasn't kidding earlier about Syrus being surprising. As she watched him pull off what many thought was impossible, she could honestly say that she became something of a fan of the short duelist. Plus, when she really got a good look at him, she had to admit he was really cute.

Jazz on the other hand was still in a state of shock and awe. She kept replaying the entire duel in her head, and no matter how many times she thought about it she still couldn't believe it's conclusion. It went against everything she thought she knew about the world. She was a bit of an elitist, and had a huge crush on Zane (much like half the school). So it only made sense to her that by all rights Zane should've won, easily. And yet Syrus had to go and shake her entire world view to the core by wining instead. [I need to rethink my life.] she thought to herself.

As for Alexis well, there was never a doubt in her mind that her knight could win. She knew from the very night he saved her life that he had the potential to become one of the best duelists who ever lived. The only thing that was holding him back was his on lack of confidence and insecurities. But now, thanks to his victories against Titian and Zane, she could see that most if not all that insecurity was a thing of the past. And as she watched her love being carried out like the conquering hero that now everyone besides her knows he is, she remembered the promise she made to herself that night.

And tonight, she intended to keep it.

What surprise does Alexis have in store?
1213222111111121111.title: The Battle of the Brothers: The Glory of Victory

choices: "We should go public."
"We should keep our love a secret."
Before she can give her answer there is a knock on the door.
12132221111111211113.content:
(6 hours later)

Syrus was now sneaking his way through the empty Obelisk girls dorm. Why you may ask? Well that's because he got a message from his secret girlfriend saying, and I quote "Since everyone's at the BBQ, come to my room at the girls dorm. I have a surprise for you that I know you are going to love. Don't keep me waiting My Knight."

Naturally, being the dutiful knight that he is, there was no way he could disobey his queen's orders. He could only imagine what sort of surprise she had waiting for him. He soon found the room with Alexis's name on it and gently knocked on it.

"Come in." answered a sultry voice.

Syrus opened the door and his jaw hit the floor at what his eyes bared witness to..

His girlfriend sitting on her bed waiting for him, naked! But that wasn't the end of it, she had 2 huge bowls placed on a T.V tray that she used to cup the bottom of her enormous breasts. With how naturally creamy and white they were, it was like she was attached to 2 huge bowls of vanilla ice cream that were also completely covered in whipped cream, tangerine slices and strawberries. She had them held in such a way that her nipples were pointed towards the ceiling, essentially making them the cherries on top.

"I hope you have enough room for in your belly after dinner my love. Because I've prepared a special dessert just for you." Alexis said with a sultry smile. "Dig in."

The unbelievably sexy sight had Syrus so stunned that he spent a full 5 minutes just standing there with his jaw still on the floor. And while Alexis thought his reaction was adorable and hilarious, she was starting to get a little impatient.

"Better hurry now, your ice cream's melting." she teased encouragingly.

Hearing this allowed Syrus to snap out of his stupor and he was more then eager to feast on his queen sized sundae special "Bon appetit!" he exclaimed.

Both Queen and Knight were in a state of pure bliss as Alexis absolutely loved the feeling of Syurs licking every inch of her wondrous melons. And Syrus knew that no other dessert he ever had or will have could compare to his lover's more then bountiful bosom, and the fruits and cream were pretty good too.

Once all the added toppings were taken care of Syrus then began to savor the cherries on top, both at the same time in fact. Feeling both her sensitive tips being licked, sucked and gently nibbled on drove Alexis mad with arousal "Oh god yes! Lick my cherry red nipples my champion! Are they tasty?"

Syrus paused for a moment to answer her "Best cherries I've ever had. I think you should try them with me."

"*Giggle* I like the way you." she said as she joined him.

They took turns licking and sucking each nipple for a minute before they shared the same nipple, their tongues grazing each other with every lick. It wasn't long before they forgot about the nipple and engaged in a tongue wrestling make out session. Soon the need for air became too great to ignore as they broke the kiss to catch their breaths.

"Make love to me, my knight." she pleaded breathlessly. "Don't worry, it's my safe day and I took a pill just to be sure. Make my yours completely. You already have my heart and soul, now all you need to claim is my body. Please! I can't bare to wait any longer!"

"As you wish, my queen." Syrus said solemnly as he quickly undressed and pounced his lover onto the bed.

And so the young lovers spent the next 4 hours becoming one. Now Syrus wasn't the most gifted when it came to penis size or stamina, but he was by no means small where it counted. Plus he was determined and surprisingly talented when it came to foreplay. He made love much like he duel, he to his time, analyzed Alexis's weak points, and when he found them he exploited them with gusto. He made her climax 5 times before he claimed her virginity, and by that point she was so wet and sensitive that she didn't feel any pain whatsoever.(in fact she came again when he entered her)

And with Alexis on the verge of passing out due to sheer pleasure, Syurs gave her everything he had. And together the shared one last amazing climax before falling asleep in each others arms

( 9 hours later )

The mourning sun peaked into Alexis's room, shining right onto the young lovers waking them from their blissful slumber.

"I never imagined happiness like this could exist." Alexis said softly as she snuggled into Syrus's chest.

Syrus smiled warmly while stoking her hair lovingly before kissing her forehead "Neither did I." As they spent the next few minutes enjoying the silence a thought came to him "Hey, Alexis?"

"Hm?"

"Do you think we should go public?"

Alexis blinked in surprise "Huh?"

"I mean..since I defeated Zane just about everyone in school really respects me now. I've even got a couple of fans now. Me, having fans! I still can't believe that! So I think that, with my new status as champion we don't have to worry nearly as much about people giving us grief about being together. Then again, I have to admit dating in secret has been kind of exciting. It makes the times that we can be together all the better. What do you think? I'm honestly okay with either one."

Alexis pondered over her boyfriends question for a minute "I think.."

choices: A few weeks later.
Reader's choice.
