121322211111112111133.content:
*Knock Knock*

The young lovers jumped a little at the sudden knock on the door.

"Hide! Hurry!" Alexis whispered to Syrus in a slight panic as she climbed out of bed to dress up in a robe hanging from the wall.

*Knock Knock*

"Just a minute!" she called out as she tied her robe together. She looked behind her to see that Syrus had hidden under her bed. She rolled her eyes a little at the obvious hiding spot, but it would have to do. Now in a somewhat modest state of dress she opened her door and was very surprise at who was there "Zane?!"

"Good mourning Alexis." he said politely.

"What are you doing here?! You know boys aren't allowed in the girls dorm!" she scolded.

"Unless they call the dorm head for permission to enter, which I did. I even have a permission slip from Ms. Fontaine." he explained while presenting said slip.

Alexis looked it over and when she recognized Ms. Fontaine's signature she knew it was legitimate. "Okay then, so what is so important that you needed to go to all this trouble to talk to me?" she asked more then a little annoyed at having her pleasant mourning ruined.

Zane's stoic demeanor turned remorseful "Well, first of all I wanted to apologize for what I said a week ago. It was uncalled for, especially since it was about Syrus. After the duel yesterday it's now very clear to me that I was wrong, he does deserve to be here."

Alexis's was a little stunned at Zane humility. It wasn't like him to admit when he's wrong about something, usually because he isn't wrong about anything. But she knew that he wasn't the only one a fault.

"I should apologize too, I overreacted. I shouldn't have snapped at you like that, it was unbecoming of me." she said sincerely.

Zane gave her a small smile "Well, apology accepted."

"You too." she responded with a smile of her own.

"You love him, don't you?" he asked.

Alexis was frozen solid at his question, she couldn't even think of a response she was so surprised.

"It took me sometime to figure it out, but it explains why you would have such faith in him. And it would also explain why Syrus gained such remarkable confidence in himself. I heard that having a beautiful woman as your lover does wonders for a man. Plus I can see his uniform on the floor." he said with a teasing smirk.

She looked behind her to see that he was right "Shit!" she swore at being caught red handed.

"What was that you said earlier about boys not being allowed in the girls dorm?" he asked with an eyebrow raised in amusement.

"You say a word about this to anyone and you will personally find out first hand why I became a Black Belt at age 11!" she threatened.

Zane just playfully raised his hands in surrender "Don't worry, my lips are sealed. But if you wouldn't mind, I need to talk to Syrus as well."

Alexis sighed tiredly "You are so lucky I trust you. It's alright Syrus, you can come out."

"..Okay. Just..uh..give me a minute to get dressed first."

(1 hour later at the pier)

Once the brothers were sure they were alone Zane asked Syrus all the questions he had left about how he and Alexis became a couple. As Syrus explained everything, much like Jaden and Chumley, Zane was beyond impressed with his little brother's heroism. And it only confirmed that what he planned to do was the right course of action.

"Well then, after hearing all that, there is only one thing left to do." Zane said solemnly as he reached into his Deck Sleeve and drew 5 cards and presented them to Syrus. "Take these."

Syrus's eyes nearly popped out of his skull when he saw the cards his brother planned to give him "ZANE!!! THOSE ARE YOUR CYBER DRAGONS!!! AND THE FUSION'S FOR THEM TOO!!!" he hollered.

"I know." he said while ignoring the ringing in his ear.

"Zane, those cards are so rare they're almost one of a kind!! You can't just give them away!!"

"I'm 'not giving them away', I'm giving them to you because you earned them and you need them."

Syrus was confused at his brother's reasoning. He could somewhat understand that he earned them since he did beat Zane in a duel, but needing them? "What do you mean?"

"You survived a Shadow Game Syrus, that means that you've made yourself a target. With all I've learned about The Shadow Realm from Yugi Moto's biography, it's clear that anyone who does manage to escape the forces of darkness only become that much more tempting to hunt down. Plus, you defeated me, the best duelist in the most famous dueling academy in the world. That news is going to travel fast and reach many ears, some of which will no doubt have ties to The Shadow Realm. And if you want to have any hope of surviving the challenges ahead you need to be ready."

As Syrus processed all this he felt as if the weight of the world was about to crush him. But then he remembered all that he managed to accomplish so far, things that he never thought were possible not that long ago. But most of all, he remembered his oath.

Syrus: I, Syrus Truesdale do solemnly swear.
That from this day until my last.
That I, will faithfully serve, protect and defend.
My, Queen, Alexis Rhodes.
That in her name, I will defeat any foe.
With courage, strength and honor.
That in her name, I will best any challenge.
No matter how great, or many.
So help me god.

With his resolve firm and a fire blazing in his eye Syrus took the cards from his brother's hand. And for some reason, it felt right. It was as if he was always meant to have these cards. But only when he was ready. He then felt a pair of arms embrace him warmly.

"I love you Syrus. And I am so proud of you." Zane said sincerely.

Tears of happiness and brotherly love fell from Syrus's eyes as he embraced his big brother with all his might "I love you too Zane!"

And all the while Alexis watched the tender moment with a mixture of happiness and melancholy as she hoped that one day soon, she would hold her brother like that again.
121322211111112111133.title: A Proud Brother's Gift, A Champion's Resolve.

choices: Stay Together.
Split Up. Maybe Sneak In Some Alone Time While Searching For Chazz.
1213222111111121111331.content:
As the weeks rolled by it turned out that Zane was right in his warnings about there being even more challenges ahead for Syrus. While defeating his big brother did earn him the respect of many of the students, it also opened the floodgates to a seemingly never ending wave of aspiring duelists who wanted to claim his new status as The Academy's Top Duelist. After all, if a Slifer can come out of nowhere and become top dog on campus then anyone can.

Or at least that is what almost everyone on campus thought until Syrus defeated 16 students in a row, in just over an hour. By that point most of the students started to believe that he was unbeatable and started to treat him like some kind of unapproachable celebrity. This did bring some much needed relief to the short champion as it was nice to go about his day with out some Random Joe trying to beat him in a duel every 10 minutes. But it also felt very weird and uncomfortable to see so many people looking at him like he was some kind of demigod.

Syrus was starting to understand why Zane was so withdrawn, it was very hard to actually talk to anyone when they think everything you say is gospel.

Luckily his friends and girlfriend still treated him like a human being, and he found a strange comfort in Chazz still calling him things like "Shorty" or "Slifer Scrub", or saying things like "You just got lucky against Zane. Just know that if I ever dueled you, I would school you." Normally talk like would either demoralize him or annoy him, but seeing someone still treating him as someone who could still be defeated helped him remember what his life used to be like, and it kept him humble.

As for Syrus's and Alexis's relationship well, they decided to keep it a secret for a while longer. After all, if all this craziness could happen because of Syrus's new champion title, then there was no telling what could happen if everyone found out that they were happily together. Besides, Winter Break was coming up soon. That meant that they would have a whole month to spend quality time together.

Also on the plus side Syrus, Jaden and Chumley all found a new friend in Bastion Misawa, a Ra Yellow and arguably the smartest student in the whole school. He is a total math and science prodigy, with formulas and equations for nearly every thing he does, especially his dueling strategies. With 6 different duel decks he was prepared for nearly any kind of play style there is, and with one of those decks he defeated Chazz in a rather intense duel just the other day. For his victory and his stellar grades he could've easily been promoted to Obelisk Blue, but he made a vow to himself that he would only become an Obelisk when he became the best duelist in the freshmen class. So to do that he would need to defeat the two other students who could also fit the criterion, Jaden and Syrus.

Syrus had to admit out of all the friends/rivals he made in his first year at Duel Academy, Bastion was one of the best.

Which brings us to right now, with Syrus and Jaden sitting together waiting for their next class to start when they heard some Obelisk students talking in the back.

"Hey you know, I saw Chazz packing his stuff late last night."

"He must be running away because he lost to that Ra and Slifer slacker."

"Yeah, if that loser can't beat the ketchup and mustard team then doesn't deserve to be an Obelisk. Or even come to this school."

"But didn't that Syrus guy beat Zane a few weeks ago?"

"He is the only exception, besides he could be an Obelisk if he really wanted to. I just can't for the life of me figure out why he would want to stay at the Slifer trash heap."

"Mostly because of jerks like you three." Syrus answered with great annoyance "With friends like you it's no wonder Chazz would want to leave. Your the real trash at this school."

"You tell them Sy!" Jaden added in support "Hey we should go look for Chazz."

"What? Why?" Syrus blinked in surprise at his best friend's suggestion.

"Look, I know Chazz can be a pain, but he is one the best duelists in school. And we need all the competition we can get if we want to be the best we can be. Besides, Chazz could run into some serious trouble out there. We can't just let him face it alone." Jaden reasoned.

Syrus had to admit Jaden had a point. Ever since his duel with Titian he knew that all kinds of danger could be just around corner. And he couldn't in good conscious allow someone to face that danger alone if he could help it, even if that someone was a bit of a jerk.

"You're right Jay. We should at the very least find out if he okay."

"Good on ya Sy! Now come on, I know a great spot to sneak out!"

(A few minutes later)

"You know, I'm starting to think your using this whole looking for Chazz thing as an excuse to sneak out of class." Syrus said suspiciously as he dusted himself off from crawling out of the crawl space.

"I like to think of it as more of a side benefit then the main reason." Jaden said carefree as also dusted himself.

"Sure, whatever you say Jay."

"You know this school does have regular doors." said a familiar voice.

The Slifer Duo turned to see Alexis, Jazz and Mindy waiting for them with amused smiles on their faces.

"Oh, hey Alexis. We were just..uh.." Jaden racked his brain for a believable excuse.

"Sneaking out to look for Chazz." Syrus confessed flatly.

"Sy! Don't just tell them!"

"We could hear what you guys were planning loud and clear in class so there is no use in hiding it. But don't worry, we're not here to get you in trouble, we're here to help." Alexis explained.

"What?! Since when do you guys ditch class?!" Jaden exclaimed in astonishment.

"Chazz is an Obelisk. And we take care of our own." Alexis said sincerely.

"Could've fooled me." Syrus said dryly.

Alexis sweat dropped a little since she knew that most in her dorm didn't share her sentiment "Well, any real Obelisk anyway. Those guys are just jerks."

Mindy had a cute blush on her face and sweet smile as she said with a flirty tone "You know Syrus, I really like the fact that your going to all this trouble to help someone who's been nothing but a jerk to you. It's just so sweet, I love a man with a heart of gold."

*Squirt Squirt*

"AH!! Jazz stop that!" Mindy shouted in frustration at her friend squirting her with water like a misbehaving cat.

"I will once you finally get over this stupid crush you have on Syrus!" Jazz said annoyed at her friends boy crazy habits.

"I keep telling you it's not a crush! It true love!"

"That's what you said about the dozens of other boys you claimed were your 'true love'!"

"Okay, I'll admit those guys were just phases! But this is different, I have thought of or even looked at another man ever since he beat Zane! That proves that my feelings are real!"

"Yeah, real creepy!"

*Smack Smack*

"Can you two please stop arguing at least until we find Chazz!" Alexis shouted after giving her best friends karate chops to the head.

This had been something of a common occurrence ever since Syrus defeated Zane. Mindy had developed a huge crush on the short duelist and would use any opportunity she could to flirt with him. Meanwhile Jazz had taken it upon herself to do everything in her power to control the thirsty young woman, sometimes having to take extreme measures like the squirt bottle. Then just as the two girls would start an argument Alexis had to lay down the law with 2 Karate Chops to their heads.

Jaden leaned closer to Syrus to whisper in his ear "That's some girl you got there."

"Tell me about it." Syrus whispered back with hearts in his eyes and a big dumb grin on his face. Even now he could barely believe that he was dating such an incredible woman.

Jaden gave his short friend a shake on the shoulder "Now don't go getting lost in LaLa Land Sy, we've got a lost Chazz to find."

Syrus shook his head to regain his focus "Right, let's get going then."

"Hold on! Maybe it would be better if we split up to cover more ground." Mindy suggested while rubbing her sore head.

"No why! We don't want to end up getting lost ourselves!" Jazz shoot down.

"We can't get lost! Our I-Phones have a detailed map of the campus, remember?" Mindy pointed as she used her own phone to prove her point.

"Well..still we should stay together. We don't know what else could be out there. Strength in numbers and all that." Jazz insisted with her arms crossed.

"Are you still not over that camping trip we had a few years back?"

"WE WERE LOST FOR ALMOST 3 DAYS!!!"

"Well, Syrus? Alexis? What do you guys think we should do? Stay together as a group or divide and conquer?" Jaden asked.

The secret couple thought about it for a minute before sharing a look, they could tell that they both came to the same conclusion.
1213222111111121111331.title: Life As A Champion Is Great..But Also Weird.

choices: Let Jaden handle this like in canon.
Syrus steps up to stop Wheeler. (And maybe add to his potential harem)
Skip the duel, it's with a freaking monkey for god sake.
12132221111111211113311.content:
As tempting as it was to use this opportunity to sneak in some alone time, they both knew that it was for the best to stay together for now. There would be plenty of other opportunities later, like Winter Break.

"We should stay together. Even if we don't have to worry about getting lost, there is still plenty of things that can go wrong when your alone in the woods." Alexis reasoned with Syrus nodding in agreement.

Jazz sighed in relief while Mindy pouted as she put away her phone.

"Well then with that settled, let's get this search party started!" Jaden exclaimed in excitement while running off into the forest.

"Jaden! What part of stay together did not understand!" Syrus yelled as he chased after his reckless best friend "Wait up!"

Alexis rolled her eyes in amusement "Boys." she sighed before running after them with Jazz and Mindy not far behind.

A few hours pasted and the search party had no luck in finding their wayward classmate. So after calling out for with cries of concern or even insults to see if they could get any kind of reaction Alexis was running out of patience and decide to use a different approach.

"CHAZZ YOU LITTLE COCKROACH, IF THIS IS SOME KIND OF PRANK THEN YOU BETTER HOPE WE DON'T FIND YOU!!! YOU GOT THAT?!?!" she hollered with a voice that carried out for miles and caused a flock of birds to fly away in fright.

"Oh yeah, threaten him. That will bring him running." Jaden said sarcastically. Alexis just gave a shrug like 'what can you do'.

*Rustle*

Syrus turned to look at some bushes up ahead "Hey, I think I just heard something move over there." he said while pointing towards the shrubbery.

"Is it Chazz?" Jaden asked.

"I don't know."

"Well let's go find out."

Jaden was stopped by Syrus placing a hand on his chest "We don't what's in there Jay. It could be a wild animal." he said cautiously.

"So then, what do we do?" Mindy asked.

Syrus hummed thoughtfully before he spotted a rock roughly the size of a baseball near his feet "Well if it is a wild animal," he said as he picked the rock "Then this will scare them off." He then threw the rock with all his might into the bushes.

*Thud*

Syrus blinked in surprise at the sound "Did I hit something made of metal?"

Then out of the bushes leaped something that none of them could ever see coming. It was monkey, a monkey outfitted with machinery that made him look like some kind of cyborg. And he was nettled from that rock hitting him.

"RRRAAAGHHH!!!"

"AAAAAHHHHHH!!!"

The search party was so surprise and frightened by the monkey that all the could do was scream as it charged at them with blazing speed. The enraged primate leaped at the group after a brief struggle that kick up a comical dust cloud the monkey leaped back into the trees. The young duelist sat on the ground more surprised and confused then hurt from what just happened.

"Did we just get attacked by a cyborg monkey?" Jaden asked the question on everyone's mind.

But that wasn't the end of it as a trio of men in suits came running onto the scene, one armed with a tranquilizer rifle. "He's gone." the tallest one said.

"AAAAHHH!!! PUT ME DOWN!!!" screamed a familiar voice.

The duelist looked among themselves and saw that Jazz was missing. "That monkey must have taken her!" Mindy deduced.

"Come on! We've got to save her!" Alexis proclaimed as they ran to follow the monkey.

The monkey lead them all on a merry chase through the woods all the while carrying Jazz with him. Until he was cornered at a cliff with a tree hanging over the ocean. When he saw the men in suits getting ready to tranq him the monkey held a terrified Jazz in such a way they shot him, he would drop her into the sea.

"Damn it! Now what do we do?" the tall suited man said in frustration.

"Hey, check it out! That monkey has a duel desk on!" Jaden pointed out. "Either that or it's a very funny looking banana."

"A banana? Seriously Jay?" Syrus asked bemused.

"That's no banana!" shouted the short, breaded man in a suit "And that's no regular monkey! His name is Wheeler and he's a trained duelist!"

"A dueling monkey?!" Jaden once again asked the question on everyone's mind.

"Uh, sir?"

"Oh yes, I forgot, top secret."

So we have a monkey that apparently can duel and he had a girl held hostage over a cliff. The only question now is, how to handle this absurd situation?
12132221111111211113311.title: And It Just Keeps Getting Weirder.

choices: Syrus vs Wheeler, Part 2!
121322211111112111133112.content:
Syrus had so many questions about this whole 'Dueling Monkey' thing that he didn't know where to start. And he knew that there was only one way to get any answers, as well as save Jazz. It would be by far the craziest thing he's done to date, but by this point he was used to crazy. He ran passed the men in suits until he stood at dueling distance away from Wheeler.

"Kid! What are you doing?!" the bearded man asked incredulously.

"I'm putting a stop to this madness in the only way I know how! Wheeler, I challenge you to a duel!" Syrus proclaimed.

Everyone stared at the short hero in complete disbelief, all except Jaden who was pouting "Aw man! I wanted to duel him!"

"Here's the deal! If I win the duel then you let Jasmine go! But if you win the duel then your free to go! How does that sound?" Syrus proposed.

"Wait, 'he's free to go'?! Where does that leave me?!" Jazz asked with tears of fright welling in her pretty gray eyes.

Syrus gave her a comforting smile "Don't worry Jasmine. I'm going to win and your going to be just fine." Syrus's eyes then turned determined as he shifted his focus back to Wheeler "What do you say Wheeler? It's all up to you!"

The trained primate gazed deep into the short human's eyes. And unlike all the other humans who looked at him like he was just a tool, a thing that they can use however they pleased, this human looked at him like he was a living, thinking being. And he was giving him the choice to use the skills he was forced to learn to fight for his freedom. It was an offer he couldn't refuse.

Wheeler nodded in agreement as he placed Jazz safely on a stable part of the tree before leaping onto a stone right in front of the tree and activated his Duel Disk.

Syrus smiled at seeing that Wheeler was reasonable and activated his own Duel Disk "Alright Wheeler, show me how you duel!"

"DUEL!" said a high pitched robotic voice from Wheeler's helmet.

All the other duelists did a double take "He can talk?!" Mindy asked in amazement.

"Please! A talking monkey is completely unrealistic! His helmet reads his mind and talks for him!" the short bearded man said as if it made perfect sense.

Syrus sweat dropped [You know, a talking monkey actually sounds more believable then that.] he thought with snark before returning his focus back to the task at hand.

"I hope Syrus knows what he's doing." Mindy said with worry.

"It's alright Mindy. Syrus always has a plan, he and Jazz will be just fine." Alexis said with total faith in her lover.

"Yeah! That monkey's not going to know what hit him!" Jaden added in support for his best friend.

Syrus LP: 4000
Wheeler LP: 4000

Syrus made the first draw.

Syrus's Hand: Gyroid, Drillroid, Cycroid, Training Wheels, Expressroid, Rush Recklessly.

[This can definitely come in handy later.] he thought as plan started to form in his head.

"I summon Gyroid in Attack Mode!" he called out.

Gyroid ATK: 1000

"Alright Wheeler, let's see what you've got!" he said encouragingly.

Wheeler was taken aback a little by the human's kindness, it was so unlike all he had experienced for most of his life. But he shook it off and got ready to make his move.

Meanwhile Jazz wasn't so happy with Syrus giving his opponent any slack since her freedom hanged in the balance, literally. "Please just focus on saving me rather then treating this any other duel!" she pleaded.

Syrus just smiled at her patiently "I gave you my word that I would save you Jasmine. So it's as good as done."

Jazz felt her heart skip a beat. He said that with such confidence, such sincerity and warmth that she couldn't help but believe him. It was so different from when most other guys had said anything nice to her.

"MY TURN. DRAW." Wheeler 'said' as he looked at the card he just drew, and he had a feral smile as he made his move "BERSERK GORILLA! ATTACK MODE!"

Berserk Gorilla ATK: 2000

Syrus's own smile turned feral as well since he knew what was coming, and he welcomed it "Bring it on Wheeler!"

"BERSERK GORILLA! ATTACK GYROID! PRIMAL FURY!" Wheeler commanded.

The mad gorilla pounded it's chest in dominance before launching a devastating punch to Gyroid, but much to Wheeler's surprise the helicopter remained standing.

Syrus LP: 4000-3000

"WHY'S GYROID NOT DESTROYED?!" Wheeler demanded to know.

"That would be due to Gyroid's special effect. It allows it to not be destroyed in battle once per turn." Syrus answered helpfully "Nice attack by the way. Keep it up!"

Once again Wheeler was taken aback by the human's respect towards him. He was so used to humans treating him like a lab experiment that he had no idea how to handle being treated with any decency.

Jazz on the other hand was not too thrilled with her supposed rescuer giving her kidnapper a pep talk "Why are you encouraging him?! Do you want him to win and have him make me his mate or something?!" she asked with a mixture of confusion, desperation and frustration.

"I want him to duel me with everything he has, because he's a duelist! And as such that makes him my equal!" Syrus proclaimed passionately.

Hearing this had everyone's undivided attention, especially Wheeler's as he could barely fathom the fact that this human referred to him as an equal.

"But more then that he is dueling for his freedom, which is the right of all sentient life! For giving everything he has for such a worthy cause he deserves nothing but my respect! That said however I'm dueling to honor my promise to save you Jasmine, and as a knight my word is my bond! That means I too will fight with everything I've got to win! Duelist's come in all shapes, sizes and species! The only thing that makes us different is how we play! When it comes to this game the only thing that matters is which of us plays our cards better and which of us has the stronger will to win! So come on Wheeler, let's find out which of our causes is stronger! My Honor! Or Your Freedom!" Syrus bellowed with all his heart.

Jazz was completely stunned by Syrus's speech, especially because she could tell that he meant every word of it. Thought she was a little confused when he referred to himself as a knight, but her imagination sent her a brief image of him outfitted with armor befitting a knight of his stature. And she had to admit he pulled off a valiant figure.

Mindy nearly fainted with a swoon after that incredible speech "What a man.." she sighed with hearts in her eyes.

Alexis just smirked at her lovestruck friend [You have no idea.] she thought.

Jaden fist pumped at Syrus's fighting spirit "Couldn't have said it better myself Syrus!" he shouted.

All the while Wheeler was silent as he processed all he just heard from his opponent. It went against everything he thought he knew about humans. He thought that like the ones that caged, poked, prodded and drilled him for years, that they were cruel, deceitful, selfish and arrogant. But this human, Syrus, he was kind, honest, respectful and virtuous.

His inspiring speech only made the fire in Wheeler's heart burn brighter and made him want to win not just for his freedom, but out respect for the his opponent. His rival.

"YOUR TURN SYRUS!" Wheeler 'said' with a wide, feral smile.
121322211111112111133112.title: Dueling For Honor Vs Dueling For Freedom, Part 1.

choices: Syrus vs Caesar, Part 2.
1213222111111121111331121.content:
Syrus LP: 3000
Wheeler LP: 4000

Syrus smirked as he made his draw, and it only grew wider when he saw what he now had in hand. "First, I switch Gyroid to Defense Mode!"

Gyroid DEF: 1000

"Then I end my turn by placing 1 card face down! Your move Wheeler!"

Wheeler kept his feral smile as he made his draw, and it too grew wider at the card he now was about to play. "I SUMMON ACROBAT MONKEY!"

Acrobat Monkey ATK : 1000

"NOW I PLAY KISHIDO SPIRIT!"

A continuous spell card that allows any monster on his side of the field to not be destroyed when it attacks any monster with equal attack points.

"NOW! ACROBAT MONKEY! ATTACK WITH BACK FLIP DOUBLE KICK!"

The robotic ape carried out it's order, leaping across the field until he was right in front of Gyroid and kicked it in the face with both feet before back flipping to it's side of the field.

"NOW! BERSERK GORILLA! FINISH IT WITH FURIOUS HAMMER-BLOW!"

The enraged gorilla let out a mighty roar as he too leaped in to the air, and reduced Gyroid to dust by bringing down all he's weight and strength on top of it.

"NOW I END TURN WITH 1 CARD FACE DOWN! YOUR TURN!"

"Now that's what I'm talking about!" Syrus exclaimed impressed with how well his hairy rival was playing. "You know, with moves like that I'm starting to think that Wheeler really doesn't suit you anymore!"

Wheeler tilted his head in puzzlement "EXPLAIN."

"Well, it's just that since your fighting for your freedom, that means that you're leaving you old life to start a new one. Foraging a new path for yourself, a new identity if you will." Syrus explained.

This struck a cord with the primal duelist as he realized that his opponent was right. And to be honest he always hated the name the 'scientists' gave him. "SYRUS. GIVE ME A NEW NAME." he demanded.

Syrus blinked in surprise "Really?"

"HATE WHEELER. WHEELER BOUND AND CAGED. NOT ANYMORE! DIFFERENT NOW! FREE NOW! NEED NEW NAME!" he 'declared'.

"And you want me to choose your new name?"

"I TRUST YOU."

Syrus had to admit he was honored as he racked his brain for a moment to think of a fitting name for the dueling primate. "How about Caesar?" he suggested.

"CAESAR?"

"Yeah! It means 'Emperor' or 'Leader'! I think it's because of how well you command your monsters in battle that makes it so fitting to me. What do you think?"

"CAESAR." he tested that name out loud. And he had to admit it had a much better ring to it then 'Wheeler'. He liked it. "YES! NOW AND FOREVER! I! AM! CAESAR!" he 'proclaimed' to the heavens while pounding his chest in dominance.

Syrus smiled with pride at his opponents acceptance of his new name "Alright then Caesar, let's kick this duel into high gear!" he exclaimed as he made his draw.

All the other duelists watching, even Jazz, couldn't help but be torn about who to route for. Sure they wanted Syrus to win, but Caesar's fight for his freedom was just so compelling, and he dueled like a true pro. But Jazz surprised everyone when she shouted "Go Caesar! Show us what your made of!"

"Yeah! Your the man Caesar!" Jaden exclaimed in support before back peddling "Or monkey..or..ah you know what I mean!"

"Pound that hairy chest Caesar! Play that hand! Whoo!" Mindy joined in, getting into the excitement.

Alexis stared at her knight in amazement as he looked at her from the corner of his eye and gave her a subtle nod. It was then she realized what he was planning and it made her fall in love with him all over again "Be strong Caesar! You can do it!" she added sincerely.

Meanwhile the short, bearded man, one of the 'scientists' that 'trained' Caesar was not happy to see all his years of work go down the toilet. He pressed a button on his watch to activate a homing beacon to his location. Hopefully back up will show up before this situation gets to out of hand.

"Now, I summon Steamroid in Attack Mode!"

Steamroid ATK: 1800

"Now I'll have Steamroid attack Berserk Gorilla!"

"BUT BERSERK GORILLA STRONGER!" Caesar pointed confused in his opponents action.

"I know! That triggers Steamroid's special ability! It's ATK increases by 500 whenever it attacks a stronger monster!"

Steamroid ATK: 1800-2300

Caesar was taken aback by this unexpected move, but he regained his feral smile as he realized that this duel had just gotten more exciting.

Caesar LP: 4000-3700

"Your move Caesar!"
1213222111111121111331121.title: Dueling For Honor Vs Dueling For Freedom, Part 2.

choices: Syrus vs Caesar, Part 3.
12132221111111211113311211.content:
Syrus LP: 3000
Caesar LP: 3700

Caeser made his draw "I ACTIVATE POT OF GREED!" he 'said' as he drew 2 more cards. And his feral smile threatened to split his face in half as it seemed that this duel, and by extension his freedom, was his. "NOW I SUMMON APE FIGHTER! ATTACK MODE!"

Ape Fighter ATK: 1900

This brawling ape had the effect that if it destroys a monster in battle, then it gains 300 ATK. But if it doesn't during the players turn then all the ATK it gains turns to zero.

"NEXT I ACTIVATE MY TRAP! DNA SURGERY!"

A continuous trap that changes all monsters on the field into any type the player chooses.

"I CHOOSE BEAST TYPE!"

Since Ape Fighter was already a Beast Type it didn't change at all, but Acrobat Monkey and Steamroid certainly did. Acrobat Monkey now looked like a monkey decked out in Mega Man armor while Steamriod looked like a 6 legged red rhino with a huge black horn.

"NOW I PLAY WILD NATURE'S RELEASE!"

A nasty spell card that allow the player to choose 1 Beast Type or Beast-Warrior Type on their side of the field to increase it's ATK by the value of it's DEF. The drawback however is that the monster this card is used on is destroyed by the turns end.

"ACROBAT MONKEY! UNLEASH THE BEAST WITHIN! Caesar commanded.

Acrobat Monkey did as commanded as the raw power of nature and instinct coursed through it body, causing it to become so big, muscular and feral that it burst out of it's armor. It let out a mighty battle cry as it pounded it's chest, waiting to let loose it new strength.

Acrobat Monkey ATK: 1000-2800

"NOW ACROBAT MONKEY ATTACK! SOMERSAULT SMASH!"

Syrus smirked "Nice try Caesar, but now I activate my face down, Life Force!"

This continuous trap allowed a player to instead pay 400 Life Points anytime they take damage in battle. So while Acrobat Monkey was able to destroy Streamroid, Syrus didn't suffer nearly as much damage as he should. Especially when taken into acount the Steamroid loses 500 ATK when attacked by a stronger monster.

Syrus LP: 3000-2600

Caeser smirked as well "CLEVER. BUT TRAP WON'T SAVE YOU FROM DIRECT ATTACK. GO APE FIGHTER! PRIMAL PUMMEL!"

Syrus braced himself as Ape Fighter unleashed a quick, but devastating barrage of blows. Let's just be glad it was just a hologram hitting him, otherwise Syrus would be a stain on the floor right now.

Syrus LP: 2600-700

"NOW I PLAY EMERGENCY PROVISIONS! I DISCARD DNA SURGERY AND KISHIDO SPIRIT!"

Caesar LP: 3700-5700

"Nice one Caesar! You're really giving Syrus a run for his money!" Jaden said sincerely.

"You duel better then most humans I know! Keep at it!" Mindy added with a sweet smile.

"Don't hold back now! You've all most won!" Alexis chipped in encouragingly.

"That's they way Caesar! Show him what you're made of!" Jazz surprisingly cheered for her kidnapper.

Caesar was stunned by these humans support for him, especially from the female that he held hostage. Shouldn't they be cheering for one of their own kind to win?

Syrus could see his confusion and decided to clear things up for him "My friends are cheering you on because like me, and you, they're duelists. And like any really duelist they want us both to duel to the best of our ability. Because it's only when we are backed into a corner, when the odds are stacked against us, that is when the truth of who we are as duelists, as people, becomes clear! And that is what dueling is all about!"

This human continued to surprise and challenge him in ways he didn't imagine possible. For most of his life all dueling ever brought him was pain, but now, thanks to Syrus and his friends, it brought him excitement. Unlike all the tests and drills he was forced to endure, this was a duel he chose. And he was discovering things about himself he didn't know existed. This only confirmed that everything that Syrus said was true.

Caesar's smile turned softer, more human then before.

"YOUR TURN SYRUS!"

Syrus had to admit he was starting to sweat, both nervously and excitedly as this was turning out to be one of the most intense duels he ever had. He honestly wasn't sure if he could win with the odds stacked against him like this, but he gave Jazz his word that he would win. So that is what he was going to do!

"Alright Caesar, here I come!" he exclaimed as he made his draw "I play my own pot of greed!" He drew 2 more cards and they turned out to be Double Summon and Cyber Dragon.[Now we're talking!] he thought with a smirk as he saw that he was still in this fight. "Now I summon Expressroid in Attack Mode!"

Expressroid ATK: 400

"And this handy express lane's special ability allows me to add 2 Machine-Type Monsters from my graveyard to my hand when I summon it! And I just so happen to have 2 Machine-Types in my graveyard! And I'm about summon one of them back with Double Summon! So let's welcome back to the field Steamroid!

"All right Sy! That's what I call a sweet move!" Jaden shouted getting pumped up by how this duel was going.

"Syrus! He's the man! If he can't do it no one can!" Mindy cheered with glee, even did a cute little dance while she did.

"Don't give up! You can still find a way to win!" Alexis exclaimed to her secret boyfriend.

"Come on Syrus! Show Caesar why your the school's champion!" Jazz hollered at the man who she was unknowingly falling for.

Syrus's smirk widened at all the support he was being given, so it was only fair that he delivered on it "Next I'll give Expressroid a boost with Rush Recklessly! This will increase it's ATK by 700 for one turn!"

Expressriod ATK: 400-1100

"Now Steamroid, attack Ape Fighter! And Expressriod attack Caesar directly!"

The vehicroids did as commanded, all the while Caesar remained steadfast as his monster was destroyed and his Life Points suffered a critical hit. He felt no anger, only pride in the skills of the human who showed him what Duel Monsters really means.

Caesar LP: 5700-4200

"Your turn Caesar!"
12132221111111211113311211.title: Dueling For Honor Vs Dueling For Freedom, Part 3.

choices: Syrus vs Caesar, Finale.
121322211111112111133112111.content:
Syrus LP: 700
Caesar LP: 4200

Caesar was about to make his draw when he heard familiar sounds coming from the left of the field. He turned his head to find that it was his family, looking on at the duel with confusion, curiosity and worry. He was so overcome with relief and happiness that he wanted to just forget the duel and just run into the forest with them. But he stopped himself as he felt that not only would it be disrespectful to his opponent, the human who taught him so much, but he would also endanger his family to being captured too.

"You can go to them if you really want to." Syrus said compassionately "It's not like I can do anything to stop you."

Caesar did a double take "BUT DUEL NOT OVER!" he 'said' confused.

"So?" Syrus shrugged nonchalantly "Nobodies forcing you to stay and finish. You want to leave or stay, it's your choice Caesar."

"BUT DEAL WAS I ONLY ALLOWED TO LEAVE IF I WIN!"

"No, the deal was that if I win you let Jasmine go. I never said you couldn't leave afterwords." Syrus said shrewdly. "But what happens from there is all up to you Caesar."

"Okay! I've had enough of this 'Caesar' nonsense!" shouted the short bearded man as six more men in suits armed with tranquilizer guns arrived on the scene. "The only place that 'Wheeler' is going after he wins this duel is back in his pen where he belongs!"

"CAESAR! MY NAME IS CAESAR!" the ape duelist 'shouted' with a snarl at the human who took him from his family.

"No it isn't! Everything that kid has told you is nothing but naive gibberish! Besides look at the men behind me! They are armed and waiting for you to do something stupid like make a run for it! And if you really want to be with your family so badly then don't worry, we have plenty of room back at the lab for them too!" the quack scientist said with a cruel grin.

All the duelists glared at the greedy man with righteous fury, one way or another they knew that they would not allow this man to harm another innocent ape again when this duel was over.

Caesar growled with indignation at the human who had taken everything from him and was so very tempted to just charge at the man and pummel him into the ground. The only thing that was stopping him was the fact that if he did then the humans with the guns would tranq him before he had the chance.

"Caeser!" Syrus called out to get his attention "It's your turn!" But then Syrus started to mouth silent words so that only the ape could read them 'Don't worry. We won't let you or any of your family be caged.' he 'said' with compassionate smile while making a subtle gesture to Alexis to pass on the message.

Alexis received it and silently passed on to her friends to get ready to back Syrus up when the time was right.

Caesar could not believe that these humans would go so far for him, but after everything that happened in this duel something deep in his soul told him that they could be trusted. He didn't know what was to come when this duel was over, but he knew that he would not face it alone.

He would face it with his new friends.

Caesar gave subtle nod to show he understood before he made his draw "I PLAY MONSTER REBORN! I BRING BACK APE FIGHTER!"

The primal brawler was back and ready for Round 2.

"NOW APE FIGHTER ATTACK STEAMROID! APE SUPLEX!

"Go Life Force!"

Like something you would see in a classic Final Fantasy game, the beast soldier lifted the steam engine with ease and suplexed it out of existence.

Syrus LP: 700-300

Luckily Syrus still had his trap to keep him in the fight. Unluckily the fight was only going to be that much harder as Ape Fighter's effect made it an even great beast then before.

Ape Fight ATK: 1900-2200

"YOUR TURN!"

Syrus gave his deck a hard stare [This is it. The draw that will settle this duel. One of the best I ever had. It's all or nothing!] he thought with determination as he made his draw "I play Graceful Charity!"

He discarded Drillroid and Gyroid and drew 3 more cards, and he smirked when he saw that he now another Cyber Dragon, Cyber Twin Dragon and Polymerization.

"Next I sacrifice Expressroid in order to summon Cyber Dragon!"

Cyber Dragon ATK: 2100

"Now I'll play Polymerization to fuse my Cyber Dragon on the field and the one in my had in order to summon Cyber Twin Dragon!"

Cyber Twin Dragon ATK: 2800

Caesar actually took a step back at the intimidating sight, but regained his resolve. After all he still had far more Life Points then Syrus, he could outlast him long enough to find a way to bring down that cyber beast. "IMPRESSIVE."

"You haven't seen anything yet! Because Cyber Twin Dragon's special ability makes great use of those 2 heads by being able to attack twice per turn! Now Cyber Twin Dragon, attack with Double Strident Blast!"

The mighty dragon did as commanded and laid waste to Ape Fighter and more then half of Caesar's Life Points, bringing the noble chimp to his knees.

Caesar LP: 4200-1900

Or maybe not.

"Your move Caesar!"

"Stop calling him that!" the short bearded man shouted like a petulant child.

"You stay out of this!" Jaden exclaimed firmly "This is between Syrus and Caesar!"

"Yeah! You don't have any say in this old man!" Mindy added while crossing her arms in defiance.

"Caesar became free from you the second he choose his new name! You have no power over him any longer!" Alexis stated regally.

"And you won't lay a single hand on him or his family when this is over!" Jazz chimed in with fire in her own eye.

The short bearded man gritted his teeth in anger, did these kids not have any idea who they were talking to? Well they'll find out soon.

Hearing the humans he had come to trust stand up for him gave him the strength to to not only rise from his knees, but to stand up right at full height, standing at an impressive 5'8 ft tall. He gave Syrus a smile and nod of respect.

Syrus responded in kind.

And with that Caesar made possibly his last draw.
121322211111112111133112111.title: Dueling For Honor Vs Dueling For Freedom, Part 4.

choices: A few minutes later.
1213222111111121111331121111.content:
Syrus LP: 300
Caesar LP: 1900

And as Caesar saw the card he drew, he knew that this duel was over, and he lost. Monster Reincarnation, useful, but there wasn't a single monster in his graveyard that had a chance against Syrus's dragon. And it didn't matter if he tried to summon them in Defense Mode since Cyber Twin Dragon's ability would allow it to finish off his Life Points anyway.

But Caesar honestly didn't mind that he lost, since he knew that Syrus and his friends would stand with him to help fight for his freedom. After all, Syrus gave his word at the very start of the duel that he would win, and despite all that was stacked against him, despite Caesar throwing everything he had at the short champion, he proved himself to be a man of his word. So that meant that he would keep his other promise to help protect Caesar and his family.

Besides, just because he lost didn't mean that he was going down quietly.

"I PLAY MONSTER REINCARNATION! I DISCARD 1 CARD FROM MY HAND TO BRING BACK BERSERK GORILLA FROM GRAVEYARD! THEN I SUMMON BERSERK GORILLA IN ATTACK MODE!"

The enrage gorilla was back to finish this duel once and for all.

"That's the way Caesar!" Syrus exclaimed with pride in his hairy rival "Never stop fighting, because freedom is always worth fighting for!"

"AS IS HONOR!" Caesar 'added' with pride in his own rival "BERSERK GORILLA! ATTACK!!!"

Even though it was futile the mad ape leaped at the double head dragon with reckless abandon, only to be blasted to dust mid-flight.

Caesar LP: 1900-1100

"COME AT ME SYRUS!!!" the ape duelist 'shouted' with a primal roar in his real voice as he out stretched his arms to take the incoming attack head on.

"WITH PLEASURE!!!" Syrus bellowed as he made his final draw, and he didn't even bother to see what card he drew as made his command "CYBER TWIN DRAGON, FINISH IT!!!"

The twin headed dragon did as commanded and blasted the fearless ape with everything it had. And even though Caesar's Life Points were gone, he remained standing tall, defiant to the end.

Caesar LP: 1100-0

"And that's how you duel!" Syrus said with a fist pump.

"Hey, nice catch phrase there Sy!" Jaden said while giving a thumbs up in approval.

"Thanks, I've been work shopping it for a while now." Syrus admitted with a slight blush before turning back to Caesar "Well, it's been fun Caesar, but we had a deal."

Caesar lowered his arms and nodded. He walked up right to where Jazz still sat on the tree and offer a hand "FORGIVE ME." he 'pleaded' with great remorse.

But Jazz just smiled softly "I already have." she said as she took his hand. He kept her steady as she walked herself off the tree and back to solid ground.

"Jazz!" Mindy exclaimed with relief as she ran to embrace her best friend, Alexis, Jaden and Syrus not far behind.

"That was an amazing duel Caesar!" Jaden exclaimed with barely contained excitement "After seeing all that, I gotta duel you myself!"

"Get in line Jaden, because I'm going to take a shot at him first." Alexis stated strongly.

"No way! I want to duel him next!" Mindy chimed in "I haven't actually dueled anyone in a while and I want prove that I'm more then just a pretty face!"

"Back off sister he's mine!" Jazz shouted with a playful shove.

Syrus and Caesar sweat dropped as the group continued to playfully bicker about who would get to duel the ape next. "THEY ALWAYS LIKE THIS?" he asked his human rival.

"No, this is new for me too." Syrus answered honestly.

"Alright you flea ridden failure, your playtime in the sun is over!" the short bearded man said as he and his men with tranquilizer rifles approached the group of duelists.

But the human duelists formed a protective phalanx in front of Caesar, ready to fight hand to hand if it came down to it.

"Look kids, your help in this improve field test has been most appreciated, but it's time to stop playing make believe. Because that monkey is my property and as such there is nothing you can do to stop me from taking back what is rightfully mine! Now if you know what is good for you, you will get out of the way!"

The duelists remained steadfast in defense of their ape comrade, moving Caesar's heart with how they proved beyond a shadow of a doubt that they stood by him, that they really saw him as an equal. A fellow duelist.

A friend.

And this gave him the strength to do what he had wanted to do for years. Defy his so called 'master'.

"NOT! YOUR! PROPERTY!" he 'shouted' as he ripped his mind translating helmet and smashed it repeatedly onto the stone he dueled on until it was just a mangled ball of metal and wires. And when he was done, he turned to face the man who ruined his life with his very human looking green eyes.

Green eyes that blazed with great intelligence and righteous anger.

"YOU STUPID APE!!!" the short man shouted lividly "DO YOU HAVE ANY IDEA HOW MUCH MONEY THAT HELMET COST TO MAKE?!?!"

Caesar didn't know and he didn't care. He then let out a mighty battle cry as he leaped over the human barrier his friends made to face down the humans who made his life hell head on.

"Open fire!!" one of the humans with tranq guns shouted as a volley of darts flew towards the ape.

But with incredible reflexes Caesar dodge rolled out of the line of fire, and used his Duel Disk as an improved shield to block any darts that might of hit him. With a brief moment to take action as they reloaded Caesar quickly closed the distance between him and the human who took him from his home, grabbed him by the collar and brought him to his knees.

"Take your stinking paw off of me you damn dirty ape!!" he said through gritted teeth as he tried to break free of Caesar's iron grip.

And that was when something truly remarkable happened, Caesar stood taller, looked at his former capture dead in the eye and shouted in a deep, booming voice "NO!!!"

Dead silence was all that could be heard. Everyone looked at Caesar with either sheer awe or horror, as through an anomaly in nature, a side effect from all the experiments and training, sheer for of will, or a combination of all three.

He spoke like a human.

Then he used his mangled helmet like a club to knock the arrogant human on his ass. Caesar then looked at all the other humans who had their rifles trained at him and he shouted "NO!!!" This caused them to drop their guns in pure fright and run. He then looked to his family, who were gibbering, whooting and screeching in victory for him. "NO!!!" he shouted as he raised a fist in triumph.

Caesar then turned his attention back to the bearded human who was trying to crawl away, but he wouldn't let him get off that easy "NO!!!" he shouted as he grabbed him by the back of his shirt and dragged him to the edge of the cliff and held him over it by his neck.

"We got to stop him!" Jaden exclaimed as he tried to stop their ape friend from doing something he would regret.

But Syrus stopped him "No Jaden! This is Caesar's choice! We can't interfere!" he stated firmly.

"Are you insane?!" the short bearded man shouted incredulously "This animal is going to kill me!!"

"Well after everything you did to him, and all you planned to do to his family, maybe it's what you deserve!" Syrus declared.

Caesar smirked viciously in agreement, and slightly loosened his grip.

"And he's not an animal! He's more then that!" Syrus added.

Caesar's smirk disappeared as he looked back at his rival, who had eyes full of faith in him.

"He's all yours Caesar. Do with him what you will."

The ape then turn back to the human who's life he literally held in his hands. He hated him. He hated him with every fiber of his being. All of his instincts were screaming at him to drop him, to make him pay for everything he's done.

But deep in his soul he knew that if he did, then he would prove him right. That he was just an animal. And he refused to allow him that kind of victory. Not after coming this far, thanks to his new friends.

Caesar walked back until the man was back on his knees on solid ground "Never. Come. Back." he threatened slowly but clearly before throwing the human a good few feet away from him. The terrified man ran like the devil was on his heels back to lab.

The ape grunted as he turned back to face his friends who were cheering him on for his mercy. And Syrus, giving him a smile and nod at proving his faith in him was not misplaced. It was in that moment that he proved once and for all that he was not 'Wheeler, The Dueling Monkey'.

He was 'Caesar, The Ape Duelist'.

And he was free.
1213222111111121111331121111.title: Syrus vs Caesar, Finale.

choices: Start by telling them the truth about her relationship with Syrus.
Politely, but strongly tell them "Back Off Bitches! He's Mine!"
12132221111111211113311211111.content:
Thanks to his new human friends help, Caesar was now free of all the machinery attached to his body. He now looked like a proper chimpanzee again, a chimpanzee very human looking eyes, that could effortlessly walk up right and speak human, but still. The only thing he kept on him was his Duel Disk.

He looked on at the humans who had given him so much with endless gratitude, but then he realized something important. He didn't know most of their names.

"Names?" he asked while pointing at them.

"Name's Jaden!" he answered with a friendly smile.

"I'm Mindy!" she said with her usual cheer.

"Alexis." she said with a polite nod.

"Jasmine, but you can call me Jazz. All my friends do." she said with a playful wink.

Caesar looked at all of them with a gentle smile "Jaden. Mindy. Alexis. Jazz." he said to make sure he had them committed to memory "Friends. To Caesar." He then turned to face the human who he had come to trust above all else, the one who helped him find out who he really was. "Syrus. Brother."

He then brought the sort duelist in a brotherly hug, which he returned.

"Caesar. Will. Never. Forget." the ape promised.

Syrus smiled as they broke the hug "I won't forget you either. But hey, don't treat this as goodbye forever. After all it's a pretty small island. I'm sure we'll see each other again sooner or later."

"And hey, if you ever feel like hanging out, drop by The Slifer Dorm!" Jaden offered "We'll have a plate of bananas waiting for you!"

"Don't. Like Bananas." the ape grunted.

"Oh." Jaden sweat dropped "Well..what do you like?"

Caesar thought for a moment before saying with a small smile "Cookies. Chocolate Chip."

"Well in that case, I'll whip up a fresh batch for you later!" Jazz volunteered.

"She makes the best cookies!" Mindy endorsed.

His smile widened a little "Would. Like. That." He then turned to see his family waiting from him and said to himself with great relief "Caesar is home." He then ran on all fours into the woods with his family right behind him.

"See ya around Caesar!" Syrus called out while waving.

"Don't be a stranger!" Jaden added.

"Take care!" Alexis shouted.

"Hope we see you again soon!" Mindy exclaimed.

"Don't let me hear anything about you snatching up other girls or there will be hell to pay!" Jazz warned playfully. She then turned her attention towards the short man who had made all this possible and felt her heart beat faster and her cheeks grow hot with a blush. She almost couldn't believe what she was about to do, but she knew it had to be done.

She gave Syrus a big kiss on the cheek.

"HUH?!?!" exclaimed the young hero.

"What are you doing Jazz?!" Mindy shouted indignantly.

"I'm just giving my knight in shining armor his reward for saving me." Jazz stated like it was obvious as she wrapped her arms around him lovingly.

"No! He's my champion! And what about all that crap you said earlier about me having a 'stupid crush' on him huh?!" Mindy asked as she pulled him free from her grasp and buried his face into her bosom. Not nearly as big as Alexis, but still plentiful.

"Well that was before I saw how incredible he really was!" Jazz said as she got in her best friends face, knowing that as she did her own large chest was now in Syrus's face "And now that I do know, I intend to make up him mine!" she said as she pulled at his right arm.

"No way!" Mindy pulled on his left "I saw him first!"

*Smack Smack*

Before this situation could truly escalate into a full on tug of war with Syrus as the rope, Alexis brought down 2 vicious Karate Chops on her best friend's heads. She then said to them in a chilling, commanding voice "My room. Tonight at 9. Don't be late."

"Oh boy.." Syrus said with worry as he hoped that his secret girlfriend wouldn't be to hard on them.

(Later that night)

Alexis sat on her bed in deep thought about how to handle Jazz and Mindy. She had know them for most of her life, they were like sisters to her. But seeing them fighting over Syrus infuriated her beyond belief. So she had to do something about this before it gets out of hand. But she just wasn't sure what. She had a few ideas, but they were crazy. Though some part of her was excited about them.

*Knock Knock*

"Come in." she called out.

They door opened to reveal Jazz and Mindy both looking a little nervous. It was in that moment that Alexis knew what she had to do..
12132221111111211113311211111.title: Heartfelt Goodbyes..For Now. Later That Night.

choices: They say with heartbroken eyes "He's all yours."
They politely state "We won't give up. We will fight for him if we have to."
They smile and ask "Any room for more?"
121322211111112111133112111111.content:
Alexis took a deep breath to steady her herself and gave them a calming smile "Don't worry girls, I'm not really mad anymore about earlier." she said sincerely.

Hearing this made Jazz and Mindy sigh in relief as the both fully entered the room, closing the door as they do. They don't see Alexis truly mad that often, but it was always a scary sight to behold. So it was nice to hear that they were spared from The Queen Of Obelisk Blue's wrath.

"Still, you hit us harder then usual that time." Jazz pointed out while rubbing her head, still remembering the intense pain. It felt like her head was about to split open.

Alexis sighed in remorse "I know, and I'm sorry. It's just that.." she paused for a moment to think about how to best explain herself. "There's is something I need to tell you both. Honestly, it's something I should've told you about weeks ago. That way we could've avoided this whole mess."

"What is it?" Mindy asked curiously.

Alexis took in another deep breath to prepare herself "I'm in love with Syrus and we've been dating for almost 2 months." she explained quickly, but clearly.

"WHAT/WHAT?!?!" they exclaimed in disbelief, and how could they not?

Alexis had gone on record saying that she wasn't in dating many times. Even the times when Jazz and Mindy tried to set her up with a guy, she always said no. Most of the time politely, most other times not so much if they didn't get the hint. Or got grabby.

"How and when did this?!" asked Mindy with a million other questions racing through her head.

"You might want to sit down girls, cause it's a bit of a long story."

And so Alexis went into great detail about how one night almost 2 months back she was heading to the abandon dorm to pay her respect to her brother, Jazz and Mindy were among the few she trusted with that secret, and ran into Syrus who was there because of a foolish bet between him and his friends. How she convinced him to go back to his dorm, only to be kidnapped, molested and nearly raped by a masked man named Titian. Then how Syrus bravely took on the demented duelist in an intense duel. She was practically gush as she describe how Syrus struggled valiantly and ultimately triumphed against his foe, as well as saving her from the creatures of The Shadow Realm.

Jazz and Mindy couldn't blame her. After all, it was the secret dream of any young woman to meet a man who would face impossible odds to protect them and sweep them off their feet, literally, as he carries them to safety. To be honest, they were very envious of her.

"Then I found a sword on the wall, and Jaden's knight comment got me to think that since I'm The Queen Of Obelisk Blue, it's only fitting that I have a knight of my own." Alexis said with a beaming smile "So, I had him kneel before me and swear an oath that I just came up with on the spot. And as I tapped his shoulders, named him 'The Knight Of Slifer Red', and then told him to rise, you should've see the proud smile on his face. And that fire in his eye.." she sighed with pleasant shiver coursing through her "Oh it makes my heart thunder everytime I see it."

Jazz and Mindy were dumbfounded, they had never seen Alexis this happy before. Especially ever since her brother went missing. Jazz had thought that her friend may have been falling for Jaden, but that turned out to just be a crush because not even that sweet smile she saw on Alexis's face could compare to the radiant smile she had on her face now as she thought about Syrus.

And Mindy knew that she had many crushes in her life, so she knew what it looked and felt like to 'like' a cute boy. But what she saw in Alexis's eyes was far greater then just a passing fling, it was far more then just 'liking' Syrus. It was love. True, pure, honest to goodness, never ending love.

"Of course, since we both knew that nearly every boy on this campus would be out for blood if they found out that Syrus and I were together, we felt it was best to keep it a secret. That's why I didn't tell you guys about sooner. And honestly, I felt like at the time that you wouldn't have understood or believed me about most of this anyway." she explained.

Honestly, both Jazz and Mindy could admit she had a point. Since at first glance Syrus is not what you would usually imagine as anyone who could do such incredible things, they probably wouldn't have believed her if she told them about this a month ago. But they've seen him defeat Zane and a now talking ape. So at this point, they were willing to believe almost anything.

"And that's just about everything. So, what do you guys have to say about this?" Alexis asked.

Jazz and Mindy shared a look and could tell they both came to the same conclusion, they shared a nod, looked back at their friend and said..
121322211111112111133112111111.title: A Queen's Confession About Her Beloved Knight.

choices: Time for Winter Break!
Reader's choice.
Reader's choice.
1213222111111121111331121111111.content:
"Well it's about time!" Jazz said joyously.

"Tell me about it!" Mindy stated in agreement.

"Huh?" Alexis blinked in surprise.

"We were starting to worry that you would never find a boyfriend Lex." Jazz explained.

"To be honest, we may have also started to think that you batted for the other team." Mindy confessed sheepishly.

"Mindy!" Jazz cried out while giving her friend a smack on the arm to keep quiet.

"What?" Mindy asked playfully.

"But, what about earlier? When you two were about to fight over Syrus?" Alexis asked very confused. "Don't you guys like Syrus too?"

They both just gave comforting smiles "Aw, it was just heat of the moment when I kissed Syrus. It honestly didn't mean anything." Jazz said as convincingly as she could "Besides, Syrus is not even my type."

"And I've had plenty of crushes before Syrus and got over them just fine." Mindy waved in off like it was no big deal "So don't worry about me either."

For some reason Alexis wasn't convinced they were being completely honest with her, and it really bothered her. She seeing her best friends fighting over her boyfriend like a piece of meat enraged her, but if they had genuine feeling for him, then this could be more complicated then she thought.

"Plus, with these gigantic hooters you're already more woman then both of us put together." Mindy said teasingly while giving Alexis's ever growing breasts a playful squeeze.

"Mindy!" Alexis cried out with a blush as she smacked her hand away, only to have Jazz do the same with her other breast "Jazz not you too!"

"Aw come Lex it's just us girls." Jazz said playfully as her hand sank deep into her friend pillowy flesh "Damn girl! What are you feeding these things! They're getting bigger by the day, hell by the hour!" she said with awe.

"Yeah! What cup size are you rocking now?" Mindy asked with similar wonderment "Or have you finally outgrew the entire alphabet?"

"Girls, stop it!" Alexis pleaded as her blush deepened and she used her arms to try and shield her over abundant bosom. Only to realize that all she was doing was smushing them together, causing them to look even bigger. She was glad she was dressed in her best night gown, otherwise she might have burst out of anything else she wore. "...My Z-cup has been getting tighter lately." she confessed softly, since she knew they wouldn't stop asking until they got an answer.

"DAMN/DAMN!!!" Jazz and Mindy exclaimed with amazement.

"Shut up!" Alexis pouted cutely.

"Well, it's been a crazy day and we got a long day ahead of us tomorrow. So we're gonna head to bed." Jazz said with a stretch.

"Especially with Prof. Banner's make work." Mindy complained "I mean, it's great that he told us that Chazz is okay, but did he have to punish us so harshly?"

"Let's just count our blessings that's all he did." Jazz reassured as she and her friend walked out the door.

Alexis stared at the door with an uneasy expression. While she was thankful that she had her friends support in her relationship, but she couldn't help but feel as if they weren't being completely honest with her about their feeling for Syrus. She had seen the glow in their eyes as she told them the story of how they fell in love. It was the same glow she saw in the mirror every mourning as she got ready for class.

It was the glow of thinking about the man she loved.

(Meanwhile just outside of Alexis's door)

Jazz and Mindy stood in the hallway silent for a moment with their hairs shadowing their eyes from view.

"We did the right thing..didn't we?" Jazz asked with a soft, pained voice.

"Yeah. We did." Mindy answer with the same tone of voice.

"So why does it hurt so much?" Jazz asked as heartbroken tears fell down her face.

"I don't know." Mindy answered with tears of her own as she wrapped her arms around her friend.

Jazz returned the embrace, and they stood there silently comforting each other as it felt like the had both had their hearts savagely ripped out. And worst of it, is that they couldn't hate Alexis for it. After all, she didn't steal Syrus from them, he was hers from the beginning. She was the first to see him for the incredible man he truly was, and when she had the opportunity she claimed him for herself. Just as they would in her shoes.

Now all they could do was support their friend in her fruitful love life. Even though it hurts so much.

Doing the right thing really sucks sometimes.
1213222111111121111331121111111.title: This is for the best..right?

choices: Stay at Duel Academy.
It's time to meet the parents!
Something else.
12132221111111211113311211111111.content:
How will Alexis and Syrus spend their Winter Break? Will they stay at Duel Academy since just about everyone else will leave for the holidays, giving them nearly a month of some much needed privacy?

Will they leave to visit friends and family back at the mainland? This could lead to Syrus meeting Alexis's parents, or more specifically her mother. *Wink Wink*

Or maybe you have something else in mind?
12132221111111211113311211111111.title: Time for Winter Break!

choices: Jaden, like he does in Canon.
Syrus, another chance to battle evil like a true knight.
Someone else/Or we can just skip this duel.
121322211111112111133112111111111.content:
The weeks pasted quickly as Winter Break finally came to Duel Academy, allowing students to return home for 4 weeks to spend time with friends and family for the holidays. Or stay at the academy if they wished, though if they did so it was encouraged that they take some of that time to either get caught up or get ahead in their studies.

Which brings us to the Slifer dorm, were all the people who decided to stay were currently hanging out. In the dining hall Jaden was currently having an intense sparing duel with Zane who was testing out his new deck since he gave his little brother most of his best monsters. Jazz, Mindy, Chumley and Prof. Banner were enjoying the show while sipping cups of hot coco and sharing a plate of Christmas Cookies. Bastion was in the middle of helping Caesar read a volume from his new favorite novel series, Journey To The West.

Ever since Bastion had been introduced to the super intelligent ape, he had taken it upon himself to help educate him and learn to speak human language better. Caesar was at first overwhelmed by all the things Bastion had been trying to teach him, but unlike the scientists who forced him to learn to play Duel Monsters, Bastion simply wanted Caesar to learn just for learning sake. And he could tell that Bastion was genuinely trying to help the ape duelist reach his full potential, rather then use him as a tool for his own ends. So he quickly warmed up to the Ra prodigy and absorbed all his lessons like a sponge. Plus he was really starting to like all the books he was learning to read, especially the story his new friend was currently reading to him.

Chumley on the other had was a little freaked out when he first met the ape duelist, but after hearing the whole story about how he was treated by the quack scientists, he changed his tune. He also took it upon himself to help show his new hairy friend all of humanities more redeeming qualities, particularly their food. And judging by the pleasant smile on the ape's face as he nibbled on the remains of a sandwich he made for him as he read his book, the heavyweight duelist liked to think he was making good progress.

Meanwhile Alexis and Syrus were in Syrus's dorm room, cuddling on the bed while watching A Muppet Christmas Carol, an old childhood favorite of theirs, on Alexis's I-Phone. All seemed wholesome and peaceful for everyone involved, so it only made sense that fate would decide now would be the best time to ruin everyone's night by breaking their door in, literally.

*CRASH*

"What was that?!" Alexis cried out startled.

"Sounded like it came from downstairs." Syrus observed as he cautiously crawled out of the bed and peaked out the door to see what was going on.

"Syrus!! We could use some help here!!" he heard Jaden holler.

"What's going on?!" Syrus called out.

"We got a guy who claims he was attacked by Jinzo!" Jaden responded.

Syrus did a double take and shared a confused/worried look with his girlfriend before heading downstairs to investigate. Once the young coupe got down to the dining hall, they found all their friends gather around an Obelisk student who looked half scared to death.

"Just calm down Tori, tell us all that happened from the very beginning." Prof. Banner asked his horrified student.

And so Tori did just that, he told them about how he and his 2 fellow Obelisk's attempted to preform a Duel Spirit Summoning Ritual. Even though it was forbidden on school grounds they did think much of it since the first couple of times they tried nothing happen. But something was apparently different about last night since this time it worked. With cult like robes, candles, an Ouija Board and a creepy chant spoken in unison the spirit of Jinzo had been summoned.

And he was hungry.

"So what your trying to tell us is that you actually managed to summon Jinzo, the real monster Jinzo, into our world. And that he has taken your classmates to feast on their souls in order to gain enough power to wreak untold havoc?" Bastion asked with a tone heavy with skepticism "Do you realize how utterly ridiculous that sounds?"

"Dude," Chumely deadpanned with a with a raised eyebrow "we have a talking monkey for a friend. Is it really that hard to believe?"

Bastion opened his mouth to offer a reasonable argument, only to realize he couldn't think of one "Fair enough."

"But that's not the end of it." Tori said with a trembling voice "I know that he's coming for me next! I tried to leave the island with everyone else, but he was on the boat waiting for me!" he exclaimed as he was now starting to panic "There's no escape! I'm dead! My friends are dead too because of what we did! And now there's nothing that can stop Jinzo!!" he cried as tears of despair fell down his face.

All the duelists looked amongst each other, all unsure of what to do now. But then..

*ZAP* *CRACKLE*

Everyone jumped a little as the lights in the dining hall all went completely dark.

"AAAAHHHH!!!" Tori screamed as he felt himself being pulled by a powerful invisible force into the woods.

"HANG ON TORI!!!" Syrus bellowed courageously as he ran after the helpless young man, his friends not far behind "WE'RE COMING!!!"

(A few minutes later)

It took sometime, and following Pharaoh who could apparently sense Duel Spirits, but the duelists managed to find Tori laying unconscious at The Island Power Station.

"Look, there he is!" Jaden pointed out "Come on! Let's get him to safety before-"

*CLANG*

Everyone jumped as they heard and saw the fence gates close behind them, and sparks of electricity flew everywhere, trapping the group in a now electrified cage.

"You're not going anywhere!!" said a malicious voice as the electric bolts gathered in one spot across them, giving form to the static visage of Jinzo.

"This is not good!" Jazz exclaimed in fright as she clung to Mindy for comfort.

"No kidding!" Mindy cried out as she held onto her friend tight.

"How do you guys always get mixed up in crap like this?!" Chumley asked beyond freaked at what was happening.

"Easy Pharaoh." Prof. Banner said soothingly to his frightened cat in his arms "It's going to be okay."

The only ones who managed to remain calm were, Syrus, Jaden, Zane, Alexis, Bastion and Caesar. All of whom started down the evil spirit, ready to do battle to stop him from consuming more power, safe Tori, his friends and themselves.

The only question is, who well step up to take on such a daunting task?
121322211111112111133112111111111.title: Duel Academy Holiday Horror Story.

choices: Syrus vs Jinzo, Part 2.
1213222111111121111331121111111112.content:
"Let Tori go, Jinzo!" Syrus demanded.

"And why should I listen to a puny mortal like you?" Jinzo asked condescendingly "After all, this mortal and his friends made a deal with me. So it is only fair that they hold up their end of the bargain." But then, strangely enough, a twisted sense of mercy came over the sinister specter "But since it is a time of holidays for you mortals, I suppose I can be a little generous and spare this ones life."

Everyone blinked in surprise at this. He had to be lying or there was some kind of catch.

"If one of you is willing to take his place. Hehehehaha!!"

There it is.

"How about this!" Syrus called out as he stepped forward until he was within dueling distance of Jinzo "I challenge you to a duel! If I win, then you let Tori and the other 2 you've kidnapped go! But if you win, then you can take my soul instead!"

Everyone looked at the short champion like he just lost his mind. Did he understand what he was risking with this crazy plan of his?!

"A duel?" Jinzo asked intrigued "Very well. I should have enough power gathered to have a short match. Besides, it will be all the sweeter for me to watch you struggle to not only save this fool and his friends, but yourself as I consume your essence bit by bit."

"We'll see about that!" the young knight said steadfast.

"Syrus!! You can't be serious!!" Alexis exclaimed to her lover with worry as she tried to pull him away from the dangerous spirit, but he prove to be stronger and more stubborn then he looked as remained where he stood.

"It's the only way to save them and stop Jinzo!" Syrus reminded as he cupped her cheek tenderly. "Don't worry my queen, I promise I will defeat him and come back to you in one piece." he said softly with a familiar fire in his eye.

Seeing that fire in his eye filled Alexis with hope and pride. It never ceased to amaze her how far he had come from that scared out of his wits dork she met at the abandoned dorm not 3 months ago. But she knew that this time Syrus would be playing a genuine Shadow Game from start to finish, which meant that if he did lose, then there was no coming back.

She kissed him with all her love and might for what could likely be the last time "I'll be waiting." she whispered with tears of love and fear for her brave, wonderful, but foolish knight.

"Syrus!!" Jaden called out to his best friend as he took his deck out his Duel Disk and gave him the disk "You're gonna need this!"

Syrus smiled at his friends faith in him as he equipped the disk and placed his own deck in place "Thanks Jay! I'll be sure to give it back once I'm done."

"I'll hold you to that!" Jaden said with his trademark carefree grin despite the grave situation.

"Good luck Syrus." Zane said calmly, knowing that his little brother was up to the challenge.

"I hope you know what your doing Syrus." Bastion said with a reasonable degree of worry.

"Kick his spooky ass Sy!" Jazz exclaimed to her secret love.

"Show him why you don't mess with Duel Academy's best duelist!" Mindy cheered for her not so secret love.

Caesar just gave a firm nod of faith and grunted out one word "Win."

"This isn't your first Shadow Game Sy! So please make sure it's your last!" Chumley added, only to realize what he just said meant "I'm m-mean, make sure to win of course! But just make sure that this is the last time you get roped into playing a Shadow Game!" he clarified with a sweat drop.

"Are you done saying your final goodbyes yet?" Jinzo asked with an impatient tone.

"They're not my last, because I'm not going to lose to you!" Syrus boasted as he activated 'his' Duel Disk "Alright Jinzo, show me how you duel!"

"If you insist." Jinzo said with sick glee.

And with a great surge of electricity so large that for a few seconds it bathed the area in a brilliant blue light, the duel commenced.

Syrus LP: 4000
Jinzo LP: 4000

As Syrus drew his had, Jinzo literally summoned 5 cards from the either behind him with their backs facing forwards, then summoned a 6th for his first draw.

"I summon Malice, Doll Of Demise in Attack Mode!"

Malice, Doll Of Demise ATK: 1600

"Next I play the Spell Card, Ectoplasmer! This card makes it so that we both have to sacrifice one of our monster at the end of our turn! And as a result, half of the monster's ATK is dealt to the other player as damage! But best of all, is that since Malice is being sent to the graveyard as from the effect of a Spell Card, then I'm allowed to re-summon on my next turn!"

The murderous doll was reduced to a vengeful wisp that flew across the field and pierced right through the short hero before disappearing.

"AAAAHHHH!!!" Syrus screamed in agony as it felt like something ice cold just literally reached into his chest and squeezed his heart like a squeaky toy.

Syrus LP: 4000-3200

Funny thing about dueling now in days, is that even though the monsters, spells and traps are nothing but holograms, the sound and sights of a duel can be so realistic that your brain can trick itself into thinking that your body is actually being attacked. That's why most duelist react like their actually in pain for a few seconds whenever their Life Points suffer damage. Because for that brief moment they actually feel like it's real, before remembering it's all fake.

But this was nothing like any duel Syrus had ever played before, because this pain was very real and it didn't let up.

"Despite you rather puny body, your soul is quite powerful and tasty!" Jinzo complimented.

"Syrus!! Your feet!!" Jaden pointed out in worry.

Syrus powered through the pain to open his eyes and see that to his horror, his feet and half his shins were see through. This proved that unlike his duel with Titian, this was a real Shadow Game. He wasn't just fighting to protect his Life Points anymore.

He was fighting for his life.
1213222111111121111331121111111112.title: Syrus Vs Jinzo, The Very Unfriendly Ghost, Part 1.

choices: Syrus vs Jinzo, Finale.
12132221111111211113311211111111121.content:
Syrus LP: 3200
Jinzo LP: 4000
