1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.content:
*Knock Knock*

"Who could that be at this hour?" Alexis asked.

"Let me check." Syrus volunteered as he put on some pants. Now looking somewhat presentable he answered the door, only to be completely stunned by who was there.

"Hello there." greeted a very familiar voice "You are Syrus Trusedale correct?"

There was no mistaking that voice, or that hair. Yugi Freaking Moto himself was at Syrus's doorstep looking for him! Words could not begin to described how honored the young duelist was to be in the presence of The REAL King Of Games.

Yugi immediately knew where this was going when he saw the all too familiar starstruck expression on Syrus's face."*Sigh* Go ahead. Get it out of your system." he said resignedly.

Syrus prostrated himself at Yugi's feet "I'M NOT WORTHY!!!" he cried out in reverence.

Yugi rolled his eyes "Every time." he said quietly to himself "Are you done?"

"Not yet!" the still kneeling champion exclaimed, while quietly thanking any higher power that made this meeting possible. "Okay I'm done!" he said happily as he stood back up.

"Good." Yugi said with relief "Because we have much to discuss. You ladies won't mind if I borrow him for while, will you?" he asked politely.

All The Obelisk Beauty Trio could do was shake their heads in stunned unison, letting him know that they didn't mind.

"Excellent. Follow me." he instructed the young duelist, who eagerly did as he was told. After about a minute of walking together in silence, the pair of duelists now stood side by side at the cliff side behind The Slifer Dorm. "First of all, great work defeating my deck and returning it to safe hands." Yugi sincerely commended.

Syrus eyes widened in shock "You know about that already?!"

Yugi just chuckled "I always know what's happening to my deck. After everything I've been through over the years, my cards and I have foraged a bond that allows me to see and hear what they do. This isn't the first time someone tried to claim my deck as their own, and it won't be the last. But in the end, one way or another, my deck always finds a way to return to me."

"The Heart Of The Cards!!" Syrus exclaimed with realization.

"Yes." Yugi said happy to see that he understood. "It's very real, and capable of more then you can imagine. It is a power that only those who truly believe in their deck can wield. By believing in your deck, your deck believes in you. Thus allowing you to draw the cards you need to achieve victory, even in the most hopeless of times. It comes more naturally to some, like your friend Jaden. But when given the opportunity, even the most unlikely of people can unlock it's power."

"So Jaden really did get Winged Kuriboh from you!" Syrus stated with awe "I always thought he was just pulling my leg!"

Yugi smiled fondly as he thought back to that day. "I sensed The Heart Of The Cards was strong in him. And Winged Kuriboh took a liking to him the second we met. So it only made sense to give him the means he would need to reach his full potential." he explained as he turned his full attention to Syrus "And that is the main reason why I'm here, to help you unlock your own hidden potential."

Syrus blinked in confusion "What do you mean?"

"You have only just began to understand the power of The Heart Of The Cards. And I have no doubt that in time you will learn to master it. But I sense that many years of self-doubt and insecurities have severely damped your progress. So, I'm here to help break the chains in your mind that hold you back."

Yugi then held an open had out to Syrus's forehead and closed his eyes in concentration. The Eye Of Anubis glowed on his own forehead as he channeled the magics of ancient times, just like Atem taught him.

Syrus had no idea what was going on, but all he knew was that whatever Yugi was doing to him was amazing. It was like he was waking up from a life long sleep, his mind clearer and more focused then ever. It was as if he was looking at the world with a brand new pair of eyes.

And just like that, The Eye Of Anubis faded from Yugi's forehead. The sudden ritual complete. "There we are. How do you feel?" he asked courteously.

"I'm..not sure.." Syrus said quietly, very overwhelmed by all that was happening. He was the startled by the sound of a bike bell, a bike bell that he somehow could understand was someone asking him if he was alright. He turned to his side to see the transparent form of Cycriod looking at him with worry in his eye. "Cycriod?!" he asked a little freaked out at seeing one of his monsters outside of a duel. "When and how did you get here?!"

"He's been here the whole time." Yugi answered calmly "You just couldn't tell at first."

"You can see him too?!" Syrus hoping that he wasn't going crazy.

"Yes. I can see all duel spirits." Yugi assured as Kuriboh appeared on his shoulder "And now so can you."

"This so..weird..so much.." Syrus fell to the ground on his butt as the suddenness of all this was too much for him. But just before it could all become crazy, he felt something soothing touch his back. Like a trusted friend was wrapping a comforting arm around his shoulder. He looked to his side to see that Cycriod was indeed comforting him, and he couldn't help but smile gratefully at his old friend being there for him in a whole new way. "Thanks buddy."

Cycriod let out another bell chime that translated to "Anytime."

"You are now connected to your deck in a way that few duelists are." Yugi explained "And if you respect that bond, and always believe in your deck, in your friends, then it will serve you well." He then held out a hand for the young champion to grab hold.

Syrus took the offered hand and was back on his feet "Thank you." he said sincerely.

"My pleasure." The King Of Games replied with a warm smile, then began to walking away. "Good luck."

"I'll make you proud!" Syrus called out strongly.

Yugi paused to give a parting thumbs up before heading off to parts unknown.

Meanwhile Syrus looked to his spirit friend with a warm smile, then gazed into the rising sun with a new sense of purpose and inner strength. "A new day begins Cycriod. And with it, a new adventure." he said eagerly.

Cycriod chimed with agreement.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.title: A True King's Gratitude. Potential Unleashed.

choices: Lets Get This Tournament Started!
Skip the Tournament. (Reader's choice on who wins)
Reader's choice.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.content:
3 weeks have past since Syrus's intense duel with Dimitri, but thing were only getting more exciting as The Annual School Duel was fast approaching. Normally when this time comes around, the best student in the whole school would be chosen as the representative. And with Syrus now holding that title since he defeated Zane, the choice would've ordinarily been obvious.

But this year North Academy, Duel Academy's rival, was having a freshmen represent them. Plus, ever since Syrus's victory against Zane, nearly every student has had a fire lit under them and have stepped up their game. And they only became more motivated when they saw Syrus defeat Yugi's Deck, so Duel Academy was honestly spoiled for choice on who they could pick to represent them.

So to resolve this, The Top 64 students (out of over 300) would battle it out in a Tournament to decide once and for all, who was the best of Duel Academy. The first part of the tournament was played out in preliminary rounds, were 4 duels played out at once, thinning out the herd until The Top 8 duelists were selected to take part in the main event.

The Top 8 had many expected faces among them, but also a couple surprising ones too. The expected ones were Syrus, Alexis, Zane, Jaden, and Bastion. But the surprising additions were Brier, the former Duel Giant. Missy, an Obelisk who specializes in Insect Monsters, and Alexis's rival for the title of Queen Of Obelisk Blue. And the most surprising combatant was Chumley, who thanks to all of Syrus and Jaden's coaching has really come a long way.

And so now the Tournament bracket was as follows..

Syrus Vs Brier.

Alexis Vs Missy.

Chumley Vs Zane.

Jaden Vs Bastion.

Only one of these duelists shall become Duel Academy's representative! And you, can decide who!
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.title: The School Duel Is Just Around The Corner!

choices: Next Up, Alexis Vs Missy!
Skip the rest of the tournament. (Reader's Choice on who wins)
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.content:
Shepard stood in the middle of Duel Academy Stadium with microphone in hand, ready to kick off the tournament.

"Students and faculty, welcome to main event of The School Representative Tournament!" he cheered into the mic, to which he was met with enthusiastic applause. "This has been one the most exciting events in this academy's history! For never before has this school had such influx of exceptional students, ready to represent our school in The Annual School Duel, taking place in 1 week from today! But only 1 of these duelists can be the best! And only the best will do in order to represent us! So lets not waste any more time, and find out who that duelist is by getting this tournament underway!"

The crowd roared in agreement as the first combatants stepped into the ring, Syrus on the left, and Brier on the right.

"Nice to see that you've finally got over your stage fright." Syrus complemented genuinely.

"Yeah, all thanks to you." Brier responded in kind, before getting a competitive smirk on his face. "But soon you're going to regret helping me, because I'm now going to beat you, claim you title as Champion, and win this whole tournament!" he called out as he activated his Duel Disk.

Syrus had a smirk of his own "We'll see about that!" he stated while activating his own Duel Disk "Show me how you duel Brier!"

Syrus LP: 4000
Brier LP: 4000

"Alright, here we go!" Brier called out as he made the first draw "I summon Giant Orc in Attack Mode!"

Giant Orc ATK: 2200

A powerful monster, but it has 0 DEF. And when he makes an attack, he switches to Defense Mode, and can't switch back to Attack Mode until the players next turn.

"Your move Syrus!"

"Okay, here goes!" Syrus said as he made his draw.

Syrus's Hand: Submarineriond, Cyber Dragon, Cyber Dragon, Cycriod, Training Wheels, Pot Of Greed.

Syrus's smirk widened a little as a plan was taking form in his mind "First, I play Pot Of Greed to draw 2 more cards!" And the cards he drew were Draining Shield and Double Summon "And now, I summon Submarineriod in Attack Mode!"

Submarineriod ATK: 800

"Next I play Double Summon, in order to also summon Cycriod!"

Cycriod ATK: 800

"Then I'll equip Cycriod with Training Wheels! This way both my monsters can attack you directly! Sure I'll have to bring Cycriod back to my hand, but Submarineriod will switch to Defense Mode after he makes his attack! So my Life Points are safe! Get him guys!" Syrus commanded his friends.

And they were more then happy to obey as they hit the short Ra with everything they've got.

Submarineriod DEF: 1800

Brier LP: 4000-2400

Syrus smiled as his trusted spirit companion returned to his hand "Nice work." he commended.

Cycriod let out a cheerful bell chime that only Syrus could hear, that told him it was no big deal.

"Then I'll end my turn with 1 card face-down!"

Brier dusted himself off from that last hit and made his draw. And got his smirk back as he saw the card he drew "I summon Goblin King in Attack Mode!"

Goblin King ATK: 0-1000

He may start off as a weak monster, but he gains 1000 ATK and DEF for every Fiend Monster on the field other then himself. Also as long as more then 1 other Fiend Monster is on the field, then Goblin King can't be attacked.

"Then, I sacrifice 2 Warrior Monsters from my hand in order to special summon 2 Half Goblins in Defense Mode!"

Half Goblin x 2 DEF: 500

Goblin King ATK: 1000-3000

"And now, I'll have Giant Orc attack Submarineriod with Bone Basher!"

"Sorry Brier, but you just activated my Trap!" Syrus interrupted "Draining Shield! Now your Giant Orc's attack is negated, and his ATK is added to my Life Points!"

A green barrier stopped the bone wielding fiend's attack in it's tracks, then the barrier was absorbed into Syrus making him stronger.

Giant Orc DEF: 0

Syrus LP: 4000-6200

Brier gritted his teeth in frustration, but remained undeterred "Nice one! But I still have Goblin King! Attack!" he commanded his fiend monarch.

The fiend did as he were told, Goblin King pummeling Submarineriod with a single punch.

"And I end my turn!" the short Ra stated, confident that with the solid defense he had set up can weather anything Syrus could throw at him.

Syrus made his draw "I play Graceful Charity!" He discarded both Cyber Dragons and drew his 3 new cards, and he smirk when he saw Expressriod, Polymerization and De-Fusion now in his hand, which meant he was going to get them right back and then some. "Then I summon Expressriod in Attack Mode!"

Expressriod ATK: 400

"And thanks to his special effect, I can take 2 Machine-Type Monsters from my graveyard and add them to my hand! And I choose to bring back the 2 I just discarded! My Cyber Dragons!"

Brier felt a chill crawl down his spine since those monsters were basically the worst nightmare of every duelist in Duel Academy.

"And I play Polymerization to Fusion Summon Cyber Twin Dragon!"

Cyber Twin Dragon ATK: 2800

And that chill turned into a near full on panic attack as the nightmare only got worse.

"Now Cyber Twin Dragon, Attack both Half Goblins with Double Strident Blast!"

The twin headed machine did as commanded, reducing both halflings to dust. But since they were in Defense Mode Brier took no damage. And the the short Ra sigh in relief when the attack was over.

"But I'm not done yet Brier! Cause now I play De-Fusion! This splits Cyber Twin Dragon in half to allow me to summon both my Cyber Dragons to the field! And that means they both can attack as well!"

"NO WAY!!!" Brier cried out in panic as he saw the cybernetic terror was turned back into it's 2 main components.

"Way!!" Syrus stated with a triumphant smirk "Now Expressriod, attack Giant Orc!"

The sentient express train headed his order and ran over the huge fiend, thus breaking Brier's last line of defense.

Goblin King ATK: 3000-0

"Now Cyber Dragons, FINISH IT!!!" Syrus shouted his now trademark victory call.

And the robotic reptiles did as commanded, letting loose a simultaneous blast of fire that destroyed the tiny monarch and the short duelist's chances of victory.

Brier LP: 2400-0

"And that's how you duel!!" Syrus called out his victory catchphrase with a triumphant fist raised in the air. "Great work out there Brier!" he commended sincerely.

Brier sigh in disappointment, but was not disheartened by his defeat. After all, he was now able to duel in front of a huge crowd of hundreds of people. And not that long ago he struggled to preform with 1 more person then just his opponent watching him. So he counted this as a personal victory if nothing else.

He smiled as he walked to his opponent to give him a congratulatory handshake "Thanks. And good luck in the rest of the tournament."

Syrus nodded firmly to let him know he was going to do just that.

"The winner of the first match, SYRUS TRUESDALE!!!" Shepard bellowed with pride for all the school to hear. And the audience responded with thunderous applause.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.title: Round 1, Duel Of The Shorties.

choices: Next up, Zane Vs Chumely!
Skip the duel. (Reader's choice on who wins)
Reader's choice.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.content:
"A truly remarkable start to this competition!" Shepard remarked with good spirits at how the tournament was turning out so far. "And things are only going to get better everyone, because the 2 best female students on campus are about to fight it out to decide who shall truly be crowned, The Queen Of Obelisk Blue!!" he exclaimed into the mic.

The cheers only got louder, as this was one of the duels everyone was looking foreword to the most. The hottest, and most skilled women in school walked onto the area just as Syrus and Brier stepped off.

"You got this Lex." Syrus whispered in support for his girlfriend as he pasted her by.

Alexis smiled warmly, his support adding fuel to the fire in her heart to win. "Thanks." she whispered back just loud enough for him to hear.

She then focused her attention on her opponent, Missy, a 2nd year who honestly could give Alexis a run for her money in terms of natural beauty. Her uniform was more revealing, with her blazer cut short to show off her slim midriff. And her blazer was halfway open to reveal a black tube top and a tasteful amount of her full cleavage, and she had a silver locket with a butterfly on it around her neck. Under her skirt she also wore black leggings that hugged her super model legs quite nicely, and a cute pair of pink heels.

The only odd thing about her was the style of her magenta hair, which looked like a pair of open beetle wings, complete with hair antenna.

"I've been looking foreword to this for a long time." Missy stated in typical queen bee tone with a cocky smile on her full, lipstick covered lips. "I finally get to knock the overinflated bimbo freshmen off her high horse and reclaim my rightful place as queen of this school."

[Here we go.] Alexis rolled her eyes at Missy's stereotypical behavior "Look, if your going to insult me, then at least do it in a way that I haven't heard a million times already." she said calmly.

"You're right. Those ridiculous flesh zeppelins must give you enough grief, along with all the back pain." Missy said while mocking sympathy.

[I so don't have time for this.] Alexis thought with great boredom "Let's just get this over with." she said flatly as she activated her Duel Disk.

"Are you sure you'll be able make a move without those stupid lumps of fat getting in the way?" Missy asked bitingly as she activated her own Duel Disk.

"Just shut up and duel." Alexis stated strongly, tired of her crap.

Alexis LP: 4000
Missy LP: 4000

"Fine! Let's go!" Missy exclaimed as she made the first draw "I summon Prickle Fairy in Defense Mode!"

Prickle Fairy DEF: 2000

"And with her out, her special ability makes it so that you can't attack any Insect Monsters on my field. And if you attack her, then your monster is forced into Defense Mode afterword." she explained smugly.

Alexis was silent as she made her first draw.

Alexis's Hand: Blade Skater, Etoile Cyber, Cyber Tutu, Fusion Gate, Cyber Gymnast, Doble Passe.

Alexis smirked a little as she made her move "First, I activate The Field Spell, Fusion Gate!" she called out "With this in effect, I can summon any Fusion Monster without needing Polymerization, so long as I have the monsters I need to make the fusion in hand! And I do! I fuse Blade Skater and Etoile Cyber in order to bring forth, Cyber Blader!"

Cyber Blader ATK: 2100

"Now Cyber Blader, attack Prickle Fairy with Whirlwind Rage!" she commanded.

The cybernetic figure skater did as her queen commanded, and started to to spin in place so fast she created a small twister around her. And with a graceful kick, she launched the twister at the vine fae, who was then reduced to lawn clippings. But as a result Cyber Blader was forced into a defensive position.

Cyber Blader DEF: 800

"Then I'll end my turn with 1 card face-down!"

Missy gritted her teeth in anger at this bitch ruining what was supposed to be an easy win for her. But she had plenty of tricks left, especially after she made her draw. "You think you so smart, huh bitch?!" she asked angrily "Well let's see how you like this! I summon Pinch Hopper in Attack Mode!"

Pinch Hopper ATK: 1000

"But I'm not done! Because now I play Multiplication Of Ants! This replaces my Pinch Hopper with 2 Army Ant Tokens!"

Army Ant Tokens x2 ATK: 500

"And thanks to Pinch Hopper being sent to the graveyard, his special ability allows me to special summon any 1 Insect Monster from my hand! So say hello to the diva of my deck Insect Princess!"

Insect Princess ATK: 1900

"And I'm well aware of your Cyber Slut's special effects! But I have ways to work around them, like the Field Spell, Insect Garden! With this, all of my Army Ant Tokens are sent to your side of the field, which will allow me to use my Insect Princess's special ability to gain 500 ATK for every Insect she destroys!"

Despite having her opponent's Tokens forced onto her field, Alexis remained cool as a cucumber.

And her calm visage drove Missy up the wall with anger. "Then, I equip my Insect Princess with Insect Pheromone! This will force 1 of the Ant Tokens you now have to battle it out with my princess, which means that after I'm done with your Cyber Slut, your Life Points are next! Now attack!" she commanded her princess.

"Not so fast Missy! I activate Doble Passe!" Alexis exclaimed as her Trap forced Insect Princess to attack her directly, which she took head on.

Alexis LP: 4000-2100

"And now, since your Insect Princess made her attack on me, my Cyber Blader can attack you!"

The cybernetic figure skater smirked as she stood from her knees, and glided across the field to nail the queen bee with a solid right hook.

Missy LP: 4000-1900

Missy growled at the bitch's sucker punch "Big deal bimbo! My Princess still gets to stomp your ant!"

And sure enough, Insect Princess's pheromone forced 1 of the ants to step forward to do battle, only to be blown to pieces by the princess's mighty wings.

Alexis LP: 2100-700

Insect Princess ATK: 1900-2400

"Just one more attack, and your finished!" the insect duelist said smugly.

Alexis made her draw, and smiled when she saw that she had what she needed to win, Fusion Weapon. "I summon Cyber Tutu in Attack Mode!" she called out.

Cyber Tutu ATK: 1000

"And since you have no monsters with ATK equal or lower then Cyber Tutu, she can attack you directly! Go Tutu!"

The perky ballerina obeyed and flew right pasted Insect Princess to give Missy a fierce kick to the face.

Missy LP: 1900-900

Missy growled as she instinctively rubbed her chin "Big deal! My Insect Princess is still stronger then your Cyber Slut!"

"Not for long." Alexis responded with a smirk "Because I now equip Cyber Blader with Fusion Weapon!"

Cyper Blader ATK: 2100-3600

Missy gasped in shock as she realized that her chances of winning were now reduced to zero.

"Now finish it Cyber Blader, with Trident Shock!" Alexis commanded.

The cybernetic fulfilled her order, and blasted the insect diva to dust with her new weapon arm.

Missy LP: 900-0

Missy fell to her knees and cried like a toddler who didn't get what she wanted "IT'S NOT FAIR!!!" she balled.

"Hail to the queen." Alexis stated quietly to herself as she walked off the ring with dignity and grace, like a true queen should.

"The winner of the second match, ALEXIS RHODES!!!" Shepard shouted out to the crowd, who were cheering with gusto at the one true queen's victory.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.title: Round 2, Long Live The Queen!

choices: Next Up, Jaden Vs Bastion!
Skip the duel. (Reader's choice on who wins)
Reader's choice.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.content:
"This next match is, honestly one of the most unexpected I've ever seen! Our former Champion vs a student who's been held back twice! But this year has been full of surprises, and I can't wait to see what other surprises these next duelists have in store for us!" Shepard said with great enthusiasm as the next combatants stepped into the ring.

"You've really come a long way Chumley." Zane commended sincerely "I can see that Syrus and Jaden have taught you well."

Chumley had a genuinely confident smile on his face as he said "Yeah. Maybe a little too well. Because I'm gonna win this whole shebang by beating you, and them." The heavyweight duelist activated his Duel Disk.

"We'll see about that." Zane stated as he activated his own Duel Disk "After all, I plan to win back my title."

Chumely LP: 4000
Zane LP: 4000

Chumley made the first draw.

Chumley's Hand: Des Koala, Eucalyptus Mole, Negate Attack, Double Summon, Wild Natures Release, Polymerization.

[Licious. I couldn't have asked for a better starting hand.] Chumely thought to himself happily "I place 1 monster face-down in Defense Mode! Next play Double Summon in order to place another monster face-down in Defense Mode! Then I'll end my turn by placing 1 card face-down!"

As Zane made his first draw, he had a good idea about what those face-down monsters were. It was all part of a strategy that Chumley had been using to dominate his matches in the preliminaries. But he had a dominating strategy of his own. "I summon Cyber Dragon in Attack Mode!"

Cyber Dragon ATK: 2100

"Bet it's nice to have connections to help you find super rare cards like that to fix your deck back up huh?" Chumely asked in playful banter.

"Being a former Champion does have it's perks." Zane admitted "Especially when you know the right people." he said while giving Ms. Dorthy, who was in the audience, a grateful nod.

She responded with a friendly wave and a warm smile.

"But I'm not finished yet, because now I play Power Bond! And I use it to sacrifice all 3 of my Cyber Dragons in order to summon Cyber End Dragon!"

Cyber End Dragon ATK: 4000-8000

"Next I play De-fusion in order to split my Cyber End Dragon into 3 Cyber Dragons! And I'll destroy your face-down with Mystical Space Typhoon!"

And Chumley was now starting to get worried as Zane's Spell destroyed Negate Attack. And what was worse is that since Zane had no cards left in his hand, he couldn't activate Des Koala's effect.

"Now my Cyber Dragon's, Attack!" he commanded.

His robotic reptiles did as ordered, reducing Chumley's Des Koala and Eucalyptus Mole to ashes and devastated his Life Points.

Chumley LP: 4000-1900

But the heavyweight duelist was not out of this fight yet. "I activate Eucalyptus Mole's special ability! Whenever he's destroyed in battle, I'm allowed to special summon a Koala monster from my deck! I choose Big Koala!"

Big Koala ATK: 2700

Zane gave a small smile "Nicely done." he said with respect.

"Thanks, you too. It's really no wonder you were undefeated for so long." Chumley complemented as he made his draw "But now I'm going to become the second person who managed to beat you! I play Polymerization! And I fuse Big Koala on my field, and Des Kangaroo in my hand to bring forth, The Master Of Oz!" he exclaimed in triumph as his strongest monster was brought to the field.

Master Of Oz ATK: 4200

"And you think he's decked out now, wait until I use Wild Natures Release on him! This adds his DEF to his ATK!"

Master Of Oz ATK: 4200-7900

"Now Master Of Oz, knock Zane into next week with Down Under Uppercut!!" he shouted to his beast boxer.

And the giant heavy hitter was more then happy to oblige, letting loose an uppercut that was so fast and strong that it not only destroyed the dragon it hit, but also created a sonic boom that shattered the other dragons around it.

Zane LP: 4000-0

"LICIOUS!!!" Chumley bellowed with great gusto as he held both of his hands up in a double peace sign to the roaring as he celebrated his upset victory.

Zane felt no shame in losing this fight, because it was only further prove of how much his little brother had helped those around him become better then they were before. Including himself. He waked up to the still celebrating young man "Great work Chumley." he said sincerely as he offered a hand to make a congratulatory handshake.

But Chumley ignored the offer hand and just scooped up the former champion in a friendly bear hug.

"The winner of the third round, CHUMLEY HUFFINGTON!!!" Shepard cheered into the mic as the crowd continued to applaud the underdog's stunning victory.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.title: Round 3, Rise Of The Down Under Underdog!

choices: Jaden vs Bastion, Part 2.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.content:
"Now that was a truly inspiring duel! It seems that this a year for the underdogs! And it's only going to get better everyone, because after this next match it will be time for the Semi-Finals! So let's get started!!" Shepard exclaimed to the still cheering audience as Bastion and Jaden stepped into the ring as Zane and Chumley left.

"Great work out there Chum!" Jaden said cheerfully as he gave his heavyweight friend a friendly pat on the shoulder "I can't wait to take you on in the next match."

"Your really that certain of your victory?" Bastion asked with cool confidence.

"You better believe it!" Jaden stated with passion "Seeing all those other duels has got me pumped up! And the more excited I am, the better I duel!"

"An interesting theory Jaden. Let's see if it holds any water." Bastion said as he walked to his side of the ring.

"Give him hell Jaden!" Chumley said with a fist held out to his roommate.

Jaden bumped the fist with his own "You bet! And get ready for when I do the same to you in the next round!" he said with a competitive smirk.

Chumley answered with a smirk of his own "You wish!" The heavyweight duelist left the ring so that the duel could begin.

Jaden then activated his Duel Disk at the same time as Bastion, and shouted out his favorite catchphrase "Alright Bastion, Get Your Game On!!"

Jaden LP: 4000
Bastion LP: 4000

"Very well! First move!" Bastion called out as he made the first draw. And he smirked as he saw the first piece of his strategy to beat Jaden was added to his hand. "I summon Carboneddon in Defense Mode!"

Carboneddon DEF: 600

"And that's all for now!"

"Really? That's the best you got?" Jaden asked a little disappointed he didn't see something cooler, but still excited to see what surprises his opponent might have for him. "Well in that case, let me show you how it's done!" he said as he made his own draw "I summon Elemental Hero: Burstinatrix in Attack Mode!"

Elemental Hero: Burstinatrix ATK: 1200

Bastion had a calculating look in his eye as he saw one of the pieces that Jaden needed to make his favorite monster, Elemental Hero: Flame Wingman. It seemed that this duel may end just as he planned. "Off to a good start, I see!" he complemented.

"You know it!" Jaden replied with cheer "And it's only going to get better! Burstinatrix, Attack!"

The fiery heroine did just that, thrusting a flaming spear hand into Bastion's metal beast, turning it to slag. But Bastion was undeterred, as his master plan was coming along perfectly.

"Then I'll throw down a face-down and call it a turn!"

"You don't waste anytime do you?" Bastion asked with respect "I like that." He made his draw, and he smirked as he saw the card he needed to win this duel. "I summon Oxygeddon in Attack Mode!"

Oxygeddon ATK: 1800

"Now Oxygeddon, Attack!"

"Think again! I play my Trap, Hero Barrier!" Jaden called out "With this card, I can negate any monster attack once per turn as long as I have an Elemental Hero on the field!"

And with that a blue force field protected Burstinatrix from the air beast's powerful gale force.

"Well played Jaden. I wouldn't have expected any less." Bastion commended "Then I'll just place this 1 card face-down and finish my turn."

"Alright, here goes!" Jaden exclaimed as he made his draw "I summon Elemental Hero: Sparkman in Attack Mode!"

Elemental Hero: Sparkman ATK: 1600

"Then I equip Sparkman with Spark Blaster! With this, I can switch the Battle Mode any monsters you have 3 times! And I'll use it on Oxygeddon!"

The electric hero shot Bastion's wind creature with his trusty blaster, and just like Jaden said it would, Oxygeddon was forced into Defense Mode.

Oxygeddon DEF: 800

"And now Burstinatrix can take him out! Go Magma Comet!"

Burstinatrix gathered a huge ball of fire in her had before launching it at the oxygen based monster. But rather then being immediately destroyed, the fire swirled around the monster.

"It appears that you slept through basic chemistry Jaden." Bastion said with a smirk.

Jaden blinked in confusion "What's your point?"

"My point is, that oxygen fuels fire!" Bastion explained "For when Oxygeddon is destroyed in battle by a Fire Attribute monster, then his special effect makes it so we both suffer 800 points of damage!"

And just as Bastion finished his lecture, the fire exploded out all over the field, taking out Oxygeddon and a chunk of both duelist's Life Points.

Jaden LP: 4000-3200
Bastion LP: 4000-3200

"Sweet move!" Jaden complemented "But your still wide open for a direct attack! Go Sparkman, Static Shockwave!"

Sparkman let loose a powerful blast of electricity that Bastion was helpless to defend himself against. But he remained standing as he knew that this duel was far from over.

Bastion LP: 3200-1600

"Well played Jaden." Bastion said sincerely as he made his draw "But now it's my turn! I summon Hydrogeddon in Attack Mode!"

Hydrogeddon ATK: 1600

"And now Hydrogeddon, attack Burstinatrix!"

The water based beast let loose a powerful blast of dirty water that snuffed out the fiery heroine.

Jaden LP: 3200-2800

"And thanks to Hydrogeddon's special effect I'm allowed to summon another Hydrogeddon from my deck!"

Sure enough, another monster of made of dirty water was brought to the field.

"But I'm not done! Because I now play the Equip Spell, Living Fossil! With this I can summon back any monster from my graveyard as long as they are equipped with this card! Of course by doing so that monster loses 1000 ATK and it can't use any of it's effects, but it will be worth it!"

Oxygeddon ATK: 1800-800

Bastion then gained a very confident smirk on his face "And now the fun really begins. I play the Spell Card, Bonding - H2O! When this card is in play I'm able to do the same thing that 2 Hydrogen's and 1 Oxygen do when they bond together, create water! Or in this case, 2 Hydrogeddons and 1 Oxygeddon in order to create the all powerful Water Dragon!"

And with that the 3 chemistry ingredients needed to form the mighty beast made of pure water were mix together, and Bastion's favorite monster was brought to the field.

Water Dragon ATK: 2800

"Oh boy." Jaden said to himself a little worried, and with good reason.

"It's your move Jaden." Bastion said with that same smirk.

Jaden then shrugged of his worry and responded with the only way he knew how when presented with a challenge. Facing it head on with all he's got. "Alright then Bastion, here goes!" he said as he made his draw with gusto, and he smiled widely as he saw one of his favorite cards. "Sweet! Well, since you got one of you best monsters out, it's only fair that I bring out one of mine! I now activate Polymerization to fuse Elemental Heroes, Avian, Bubbleman and Sparkman in order to create, The Elemental Hero: Tempest!"

"I don't think so!" Bastion interrupted as his master plan could now be put into motion. "I play my Trap, Cursed Seal Of The Forbidden Spell! By discarding 1 Spell Card from my hand, I'm allowed to negate your Spell's effect and destroy it!"

Jaden was taken aback as his big play was halted in it's tracks, but little did he know that it was only going to get worse.

"And now, you can no longer use the card that was destroyed for the remainder of the duel!" Bastion added the final nail in the coffin.

"WAIT!!! I CAN'T USE POLYMERIZATION ANYMORE?!?!" Jaden asked in complete shock as his go-to means for victory was taken away from him.

"I'm afraid not." Bastion confirmed "That means no Flame Wingman, no Thunder Giant, Tempest, so long as it's a fusion you now have no means of summoning any of them. This means that this duel is over Jaden. You can't win."

Jaden had heard things like that many times from nearly every opponent he ever faced in his life. But this was the first time he actually believed it.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.title: Round 4, Brain Vs Heart, Part 1!

choices: Jaden vs Bastion, Finale.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.content:
Jaden LP: 2800
Bastion LP: 1600

Jaden was still reeling from the fact that Bastion had managed to take away his favorite means of dueling. But after a minute of letting this knowledge sink in, he regained his focus.

"Well in that case, I'll summon Avian in Defense Mode. And switch Sparkman to Defense Mode and I'll leave it at that." he said with unusual calmness.

Elemental Hero: Avian DEF: 1000

Elemental Hero: Sparkman DEF: 1400

"Not much you to do now that you can't use your favorite monsters, huh Jaden?" Bastion asked rhetorically.

"Wrong. There is loads I can do." Jaden said, starting to regain his zeal "Sure fusing is my favorite way to win, but it's not my only one. My deck is full of surprises that you don't know about Bastion."

"I doubt that." Bastion countered "I've studied your deck thoroughly. There is nothing you can do to surprise me."

"That so?" Jaden asked with a challenging smirk "Well then I'll be more then happy to prove you wrong when I beat you!"

Bastion just gave a hearty chuckle "You're welcome to try!" he said as he made his draw "I summon the Mathematician in Attack Mode!"

Mathematician ATK: 1500

"When this card is summoned, I must discard 1 card from my deck to the graveyard!" he explained as he discard the top card from his deck "But when Mathematician is destroyed in battle, I can add 1 card from my deck to my hand!" Bastion to a second to look at his graveyard, and smirked a little since soon he will have enough cards in the grave to let loose another surprise for his opponent. "Now Water Dragon, attack Sparkman with Tidal Blast!" he commanded his favorite monster.

The beast made of pure water let loose a mighty blast of water from it's mouth that completely washed away the electric hero.

"Next, Mathematician take out Avian with Number Cruncher!"

The mathematical magician sent out a blast of numbers and equations to the winged hero that reduced him to nothing. Jaden was smart to make sure his monster were in Defense mode, otherwise his Life points would've taken a big hit.

"Well Jaden, you say your deck still has surprises for me?" Bastion asked with playful smugness "Then go ahead and show me what you've got."

"With pleasure!" Jaden exclaimed excitedly as he made his draw "I summon Elemental Hero: Bubbleman in Attack Mode!"

Elemental Hero: Bubbleman ATK: 800

"And since I have no other cards on my field, Bubbleman's effect allows me to draw 2 extra cards!" he said as he drew said cards "Next, I play the Equip Spell, Bubble Blaster! This gives Bubbleman an extra 800 ATK! And if he's ever attacked by a stronger monster in battle, then Bubble Blaster, for 1 attack only, takes the hit and protects Bubbleman! Now Bubbleman attack Mathematician with Bombarding Bubble Barrage!"

Elemental Hero: Bubbleman ATK: 800-1600

The bubble blasting hero took his newly equipped water bazooka, and blasted the number sorcerer with a gallons worth of water that hit him with the force of a military grade ballistic missile.

Bastion LP: 1600-1500

"Well done Jaden, you defeated my Mathematician." Bastion complemented with light mockery "But thanks to his effect I'm now allowed to draw 1 card."

"I know, but it's still my turn!" Jaden reminded "Now I'm going to lay down 2 face-downs, and activate Mirage Of Nightmare! This card makes it so that during your Stand-By Phase, I'm allowed to draw until I have 4 cards in hand. But during my turn I'll have to discard 4. And with that said, I call it a turn."

"Well then I suppose it's my turn now." Bastion said as he made his draw.

"And with that, Mirage's effect activates!" Jaden interjected as he drew his new 4 cards "Next I play one of my face-downs, Emergency Provisions! And I discard Mirage Of Nightmare to gain 1000 Life Points!"

Jaden LP: 2800-3800

"You're a stubborn one I'll give you that much." Bastion stated "But all you are doing is delaying the inevitable. I now activate Pot Of Greed in order to draw 2 extra cards. And now with Pot Of Greed being sent to the graveyard due to being used, there are now 10 cards in the graveyard staked on top of Carboneddon!"

"Is this going to be another science based monster effect?" Jaden asked worried about what the Ra genius had in store for him.

"As a matter of fact, yes it is." Bastion said happily "You see Jaden, when put under extreme amounts of pressure over long periods of time, carbon eventually turns into diamond! And that is essentially what is happening to Carboneddon! With 10 cards stacked on top of him in the graveyard, I'm now allowed to remove him from play in order to special summon from my deck, Hyozanryu!"

Hyozanryu ATK: 2100

"Now Hyozanryu attack Bubbleman with Diamond Devastater!" Bastion commanded.

The diamond dragon obeyed his order and blasted the bubble blasting hero with a hail of diamond shards, only for Bubble Blaster to take the bulk of the attack and protect him.

Elemental Hero: Bubbleman ATK: 1600-800

"And with that Bubble Blaster out of the way, Water Dragon finish him off!"

The water beast let loose a stream of water from it's mouth that carried the force of a tsunami, Jaden's own water based monster didn't stand a chance.

Jaden LP: 3800-1800

But Jaden remained determined "I activate my Trap, Hero Signal!" he called out "When 1 of my monsters is destroyed in battle, I can summon a level 4 or lower Elemental Hero from my deck or my hand! And I choose Elemental Hero: Clayman!"

Elemental Hero: Clayman ATK: 800

Bastion smiled "You really don't know when to quit, do you?" he asked with respect for his opponent clear in his tone.

"Nope." Jaden stated with a smile of his own.

"Well then, I'll end my turn with a face-down." Bastion said eager to see what else his rival could come up with.

"Here goes!" Jaden said as he made his draw "I play The Warrior Returning Alive! With this, I can bring back a Warrior-Type monster from my graveyard and add them to my hand! And I choose Bubbleman, and I summon him to the field in Attack Mode!"

With that, Jaden's ever faithful bubble blasting hero was back on the battlefield.

"Then I activate the Spell Card, Bubble Shuffle! With this, I can take 1 of your monsters in Attack Mode as well as my Bubbleman and force them both into Defense Mode!"

Elemental Hero: Bubbleman DEF: 1200

Water Dragon DEF: 2600

"Oh, and with Bubble Shuffle in play, if I sacrifice Bubbleman when he's in Defense Mode, then I'm allow to summon any monster with 'Elemental Hero' in it's name from my hand! And guess what Bastion?" Jaden asked rhetorically "That is exactly what I'm going to do! Bubbleman, move over for Elemental Hero: Bladedge!"

The bubble blasting hero vanished in a flash of light, and in his place came the most powerful none fusion based monster in Jaden's deck.

Elemental Hero: Bladegde ATK: 2600

Now Bastion was starting to sweat a little, since he knew that Bladedge's special effect made it so that if he defeats a monster in battle that was in Defense Mode, then the difference is dealt to him as damage. His only saving grace was the fact that Water Dragon's DEF was equal to Bladedge's ATK.

"And now, I play the Field Spell, Sky Scraper!" Jaden exclaimed as the arena changed into a miniature city "And now whenever a Monster with 'Elemental Hero' in it's name is in battle, and the monster they're battling has higher ATK, then their ATK increases by 1000!"

Elemental Hero: Bladedge ATK: 2600-3600

[It appears I may have underestimated Jaden a little.] Bastion thought to himself as he braced himself for the attack to come.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.title: Round 4, Brain Vs Heart, Part 2!

choices: Let's get right back to the tournament!
Let's take this break to see how the duelist are doing!
Let's skip the rest of the tournament. (Reader's Choice on who wins)
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.content:
Jaden LP: 1800
Bastion LP: 1500

"Alright, Elemental Hero: Bladedge, attack Water Dragon with Slice and Dice Attack!" Jaden commanded his golden hero.

With the order given, the bladed hero activated his jetpack and rocketed towards the beast made of water with super-sonic speed, and sliced it's throat, causing it to explode and activate his effect.

Bastion LP: 1500-500

"Impressive Jaden!" Bastion commended "But my Water Dragon has a special ability that allows me to summon 1 Oxygeddon and 2 Hydrogeddons from my graveyard whenever he's destroyed!"

And sure enough, the monsters that made the mighty water beast, were brought back to the field in Defense Mode.

Oxygeddon DEF: 800

Hydrogeddon x2 DEF: 1000

"And, I have a Trap Card, Last Magnet! It activates whenever any of my monsters are destroyed! It then equips onto the monster that was responsible for the destruction and causes it to lose 800 ATK!"

As Bastion explained his Trap's effect, a huge magnet fell on top of Bladege, it's cumbersome weight causing the golden hero to focus much of his strength to keep it over his head.

Elemental Hero: Bladedge ATK: 2600-1800

Jaden growled a little in frustration at seeing one of his best monster put in such a sorry state. "Nice one, but Clayman can still clobber at peak performance!" he reminded "Especially with Sky Scraper still on the field! Now Clayman, attack Oxygeddon with Clay Clobberer!"

Elemental Hero: Clayman ATK: 800-1800

The earth golem hero headed his command and charged into battle until he gave the oxygen based monster a right hook that caused it to shatter to pieces. But since it was in Defense Mode, and Clayman had no effect to deal damage, Bastion's Life Points remained guarded.

"I'll admit Jaden, you surprised me a little with that last play." Bastion said with a smile of pride for his rival.

"Yeah? Well I'm just getting started!" Jaden boasted.

Bastion's smile turned to a smirk "What a coincidence, so am I!" he exclaimed as he made his draw "I now activate the Spell, Litmus Doom Ritual!"

[A ritual?!] Jaden thought to himself with worry, as Ritual Monsters were always a major pain to deal with.

"Now from my deck and from my hand I must sacrifice 8 levels worth of monsters in order to summon, Litmus Doom Swordsman!"

And that is just what the Ra genius did, 2 Hydrogeddons from his field and 1 White Magician Pikeru from his hand totaled up all the levels he needed to bring out his ultimate ace in the hole.

Litmus Doom Swordsman ATK: 0

"Doom Swordsman isn't effected by Traps, nor can he be destroyed in battle. In fact, I dare say he's all but invincible." Bastion boasted "Also, whenever there's a Trap on the field, like Last Magnet for example, then his ATK and DEF become 3000!"

Litmus Doom Swordsman ATK: 0-3000

"Now, Litmus Doom Swordsman, give Bladedge a taste of your steel!" Bastion commanded his legendary warrior.

To which the doom bringing blade wielder was more then happy to oblige, charging with deadly grace towards the golden hero and sliced him to ribbons with blades as fast as lightning. Of course thanks to Sky Scraper, Bladedge was able to have his ATK boosted to 2800, so the damage to Jaden's Life Points wasn't nearly a bad as it could've been.

Jaden LP: 1800-1600

Plus, by destroying Bladedge, Litmus Doom Swordsman also destroyed Last Magnet, the source of his power.

Litmus Doom Swordsman ATK: 3000-0

"Now Hyozanryu attack Clayman!"

The diamond dragon once again let loose a hail of diamond shards the reduced the earth golem hero to rubble. And once again, with Sky Scrapper giving Jaden's heroes a boost in battle, the damage to his Life Points was minimum.

Jaden LP: 1600-1300

"But wait there's more! I now play the Spell Card, A Wingbeat Of Giant Dragon! With this card in play, by return a level 5 or high Dragon-Type monster on my field back to my hand, all Spells and Traps on the field are destroyed! So say goodbye to Sky Scrapper!"

Jaden was now really starting to worry as Hyozanryu let loose a mighty flap of his wings that both returned him to Bastion's hand, and blew away his miniature city, returning the field to it's original state.

"And finally I end my turn with 1 card face-down."

A moment of silence came over the field as Jaden took the time to really assess his situation. No monsters, no face-downs, no way to use his fusion monsters, and his opponent had a powerful ritual monster on the field and a face-down (which was no doubt a Trap). Needless to say, the odds were really staked against him.

And he wouldn't have it any other way.

"Well, I've got to hand it to you Bastion." Jaden said with a friendly smile "This is without a doubt the most fun duel I've had all year."

"I've enjoyed it as well Jaden." Bastion said sincerely "And I'll also enjoy all of the other duels I will have throughout the tournament after I beat you!"

"Not so fast! I still have my move!" Jaden shouted as he made his draw. And he smirked as he saw the card he needed to pull off his upset victory yet. "Sweetness! Remember when I said my deck had some surprises for you Bastion? Well here comes one of them! My newest hero, Elemental Hero: Wildheart!"

And with that a large, very muscular dark skinned man, wearing a loincloth with tribal markings and wielding a sword nearly as big as himself was brought to the field, ready for battle.

Elemental Hero: Wildheart ATK: 1500

"A new one?" Bastion asked curiously, but not worried "Well to bad he won't leave much of an impression. I play my Trap, Spirit Barrier! With this in effect, as long as I have a monster on the field, all damage is reduced to zero."

"Nice, but Traps don't work on Wildheart!" Jaden pointed out.

"Is that so?" Bastion asked while raising an eyebrow "Well, luckily they still work on Litmus Doom Swordsman!"

And with the Trap in effect, Litmus Doom Swordsman's special ability increased substantially.

Litmus Doom Swordsman ATK: 0-3000

"But I'm not done yet!" Jaden exclaimed as he played his secret ace "I equip Wildheart with Cyclone Boomerang! And this will increase his ATK by 500!"

Elemental Hero: Wildheart ATK: 1500-2000

"I fail to see how that is in anyway going to help you defeat my Swordsman Jaden." Bastion stated with slight puzzlement at his opponents odd play. But that puzzlement turned to worry as Jaden's smirk widened.

"That's because I don't need to beat him. I just need to send Wildheart to the graveyard while he's equipped with Cyclone Boomerang. Cause when that happens, Cyclone Boomerang's other ability activates, which destroys all Spells and Traps on the field! And for everyone destroyed, you take 500 points of damage!"

And with that final explanation, Bastion confidence, along with his barrier was shattered as Jaden's wildman hero threw his boomerang, and is it returned to him to destroy him, it's effect caused the Ra genius to get rained on by the glass-like remains of his barrier, thus loosing the remainder of his Life Points.

Jaden LP: 1300-300
Bastion LP: 500-0

The crowd went nuts as Jaden made his trademark pose "That's Game!" he said happily.

"Good show Jaden." Bastion said sincerely as he approached his opponent "It seems that I still need some more time to prepare my deck. But you can rest assured that when it's ready, I will be victorious."

"I can't wait!" Jaden said excitedly to his Ra rival/friend.

"Until then, good luck in for the rest of the tournament." Bastion said as he extended a hand in congratulations, which the Slifer shook strongly.

"The winner of the 4th match, JADEN YUK!!!" Shepard exclaimed in the mic to the still cheering audience. He then wiped some sweat from his brow "Phew, I don't know about the rest of you, but I can only handle so much excitement at once! So, we shall take a 1 hour break! This will give our Semi-Finalists some time to prepare their decks for the next round, and the rest of us to catch our breaths! Use this break wisely everyone, and see you all soon for the Semi-Finals!!"
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.title: Round 4, Brain Vs Heart, Finale!

choices: Syrus Trusedale!
Alexis Rhodes! (For zemthyri)
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.content:
As a requested by zemthyri, I give you the option to choose who will win the first Semi-Final match! Who will win in this duel between lovers?

Will it be The Knight Of Slifer Red, Syrus Trusedale?

Or The Queen Of Obelisk Blue, Alexis Rhodes?
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.title: Who shall win?

choices: Next up, Jaden Vs Chumley.
Let's see what sort of "Revenge" Alexis has in mind for Syrus.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.content:
"So, I trust everyone enjoyed the break?" Shepard asked the audience, to which they responded with a short applause to say 'yes'. "Excellent! Now it's time for the Semi-Finals to begin! In this match, we have our current champion Syrus Truesdale going up against our best female duelist, Alexis Rhodes! Can Syrus protect his title against such a fearsome opponent? Or will this school have a new champion? Let's find out!"

As Shepard was hyping up the duel, Syrus and Alexis stepped into the ring with eager smiles on both their faces.

"Now this is a duel that I've really been looking forward to." Syrus said with barely contained excitement.

"Same here." Alexis said before her smile changed into a flirtatious smirk "But before we get started, how about we make things a little more interesting."

Syrus had a smirk of his own as he heard that "Oh yeah? What did you have in mind?"

"Well, since I'm without a doubt the queen of this school now, I figure it's about time that I embrace that fact. So when I win, I will claim you as my own!" she stated like it was a fact "Which means that you tend to my every whim without a second thought!"

Syrus raised an intrigued eyebrow "I see. Well in that case, as a knight it's only fair that I get a kiss from the fair queen upon my victory." he said as he gave her a regal bow to sell the scene.

She giggled a little at his melodrama "So confident, very well." she said as she activated her Duel Disk.

The young knight activated his own Duel Disk "Alright my lady, show me how you duel!" he exclaimed.

Syrus LP: 4000
Alexis LP: 4000

"Alright, here we go!" Alexis called out as she made the first draw.

Alexis's Hand: Cyber Tutu, Scapegoat, Angel Wing, Cyber Angel Benten, Ritual Weapon, Spirit Barrier.

She smirked [I don't think I could've ever had a better starting hand] she thought confidently "First I summon Cyber Tutu in Attack Mode!"

Cyber Tutu ATK: 1000

"Next, I play the Spell Card, Scapegoat!"

This spell card allows the player who uses it to summon 4 Sheep Tokens in Defense Mode. The only downsides is that these Tokens can't be used to Tribute Summon a monster and the player can't summon any other monster on the turn they play this card.

Sheep Token x4 DEF: 0

"Then I'll end my turn with 1 card face-down."

"Okay, here I go!" Syrus called out as he made his first draw.

Syrus's Hand: Cyber Dragon, Decoyriod, Cycriod, Jetriod, Drillriod, Cycriod.

[All monsters?] Syrus thought to himself with confusion, but shrugged it off as he made his first move "I summon Cyber Dragon in Attack Mode!"

Cyber Dragon ATK: 2100

"Now attack Cyber Tutu!" he commanded

"Sorry Sy, but I have my Trap, Spirit Barrier!" Alexis called out as her perky ballerina was reduced to ashes by a Strident Blast. "Thanks to all my Sheep Tokens out, I take no damage."

"Very clever." Syrus complemented his secret girlfriend "Then I guess I'll just end my turn.

"Got nothing clever for me?" she asked coyly.

"Oh I've got something planned." he answered with a playful wink "But you'll just have to wait and see."

"In that case, Draw!" she called out as she drew Cyber Petit Angel "Perfect." she said with a triumphant smirk "I summon Cyber Petit Angel in Attack Mode!"

Cyber Petit Angel ATK: 300

"And thanks to this little fairy's special ability, I'm allow to add 1 Machine Angel Ritual Spell Card from my deck to my hand." she explained as she looked through her deck to find the card she wanted.

"Machine Angel?" Syrus asked with slight hint of worry, as he remembered all the times those monsters trashed him when he was training to duel Zane all those months ago.

"That's right. And now I'm going to activate that same Machine Angel Ritual!"

And with that the field then turned into a warehouse that was made for the soul purpose of creating monsters that were as deadly as they were beautiful.

"And now I use all 4 of my Sheep Tokens and my Cyber Petit Angel to Ritual Summon, Cyber Angel Benten!

Cyber Angel Benten ATK: 1800

"Next, I equip Benten with Ritual Weapon! With this, any Ritual Monster I equip this card with gains 1500 ATK and DEF!"

Cyber Angel Benten ATK: 1800-3600

"But I'm not done, cause now I also equip Benten with Angel Wing! With this, any monster it's equip to deals damage in battle to my opponent, then I can deal an extra 300 points of damage! And don't forget about Benten's special ability, which causes you to take damage equal to the DEF of a monster she destroys!"

[Damn! Alexis isn't holding back!] Syrus thought to himself with equal amounts of worry and excitement.

"Now Benten, attack Cyber Dragon with Angel's Arrow!" Alexis ordered her Machine Angel.

And with her new angelic wings and crossbow, Benten let loose an arrow made of pure golden light that pierced the robotic dragon and nailed Syrus right were his heart was. Let's just be glad this wasn't a Shadow Game or that would've really hurt.

Syrus LP: 4000-600

"And with that I end my turn." she said with her smirk still in place.

"Most impressive my lady." Syrus commended "But now it's my turn!" he said as he made his draw. Only to have his hopes dashed as he only drew Power Bond. [Aw man!] he exclaimed in defeat in his head, but kept up a poker face [I've got no way out of this!]

He then heard Cycriod let out some bell chimes that only he could hear and understand, telling him a plan. It was a risky one, but it was literally the only way he could win.

[You really think it will work?] he asked his spirit companion, to which he heard a bell chime in confirmation [Well, I don't have any better ideas.] "I place 1 monster face-down in Defense Mode and end my turn! Come and get me Lex! I dare you!" he said with the most confident smile he could muster.

Alexis glared at him with suspicion as she made her draw, Etolie Cyber. This could come in handy, but that face-down monster her boyfriend had waiting for her gave her pause. She knew his strategies well, and was not about to fall for them. "Sorry Syrus, but I know what you're planning." she stated with confidence.

Even thought he was panicking on the inside Syrus managed to maintain his poker face "Oh really?" he asked calmly.

"Yes, that monster you have face-down is Jetriod. And you have some Trap Cards in your hand to use with his special ability, like Magic Cyinder or Draining Shield. Nice try, but I'm just going to end my turn."

Syrus managed to mask his major relief as his bluff worked flawlessly. "Very smart on you part my dear." he complemented as he made his draw "I play Pot Of Greed!" And as he drew his 2 new cards, he smirked as he saw Mystical Space Typhoon and Limiter Removal. "But unfortunately, by anticipating one trap you fell into another." he informed.

Alexis's eyes narrowed "What do you mean?"

"I mean that my face-down wasn't Jetriod at all, it was Decoyriod. And I had no Trap cards whatsoever in my hand." he said honestly.

Upon hearing this fact Alexis's eyes widened in shock, only to narrow in a playful glare "You sneaky little bastard."

Syrus let out chuckle before playing his hand "Now I play Mystical Space Typhoon to destroy Spirit Barrier!"

The winds of magic blew away Alexis's barrier like dust in the wind.

"Next I activate Power Bond! And I sacrifice both of my Cycriods in order to summon Pair Cycriod!"

Pair Cycriod ATK: 1600-3200

"Then I play Limiter Removal! With this, Pair Cycriods ATK doubles again! And thanks to his special ability, he can attack you directly! Of course when he does he loses 500 ATK, but that doesn't really matter now does it? Now Pair Cycriod, FINISH IT!!!"

Pair Cycriod ATK: 3200-5900

And with that Syrus's tandem bike monster blitzed pasted Benten and hit Alexis with a combo that wiped out all her Life Points in one go.

Alexis LP: 4000-0

"That's how you duel!" Syrus shouted to the cheering crowd as he then ran to were Alexis stood "And now to claim my prize!" he said grabbed hold of her shoulders and leaned her in a romantic dip.

"You know I'll find a way to get back at you for that trick you pulled right?" she threatened him playfully.

"I know." he said smoothly before claiming her lips in a passionate kiss for all to see.

"The winner of the first Semi-Final match, SYRUS TRUSEDALE!!!" Shepard bellowed to the roaring crowd that was both cheering for Syrus's victory and him claiming what they thought was The Queen Of Obelisk Blue's first kiss.

If only they knew.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.title: Round 5, A Duel Between Lovers!

choices: Jaden vs Chumley, Part 2.
1213222111111121111331121111111112111123.content:
"Well, that was an exciting duel in more ways then one!" Shepard stated happily as the now public couple walked off the ring hand in hand. "Aw, young love. Always a joy to see." he sighed, before regaining his focus "But now it's time for the next Semi-Final! This next bout will determine who will face off against Syrus in the Final Round! Who will it be, one of the rising star rookies of this year, Jaden Yuki? Or the twice held back underdog veteran, Chumley Huffington? Let's find out!"

The two Slifer's stepped into the ring as Shepard did his announcement. Jaden had his regular excited grin, while Chumley had an unusually fierce glare in his eye.

"Chumley, everything alright buddy?" Jaden asked in concern.

Chumley was silent for a moment before he activated his Duel Disk "You better not let me win Jaden. Not like Zane did." he said in a rather aggressive tone.

Jaden was taken aback "Let you win?! What are you talking about?"

"Do not hold back Jaden!!" Chumley shouted even more aggression then before "Or I'll never forgive you!!"

"Okay! Okay!" Jaden said placatingly as he activated his own Duel Disk.

Jaden LP: 4000
Chumley LP: 4000

"Here goes!!" Chumley exclaimed as he made the first draw.

Chumley's Hand: Animal Trail, Des Koala, Double Summon, Wild Natures Release, Beast Swap, Pot Of Greed.

"I play Pot Of Greed!" He drew his 2 new cards, and they turned out to be Dian Keto, The Cure Master and Eucalyptus Mole. "Then I play Dian Keto, The Cure Master to gain 1000 Life Points!"

Chumley LP: 4000-5000
